They are very thin first of all, which is not a bad thing but if you want a quality patch to mend clothing or add to clothing, thicker is better. The colors were off, a lot. I didn't expect them to look exactly like the picture, but I also didn't expect them to be that off.

The biggest issue was there was no instructions. What is the temperature? Time? Pressure? If you just want a cheap patch to cover something up or maybe just to stick on something for an event, and don't mind wasting a couple to figure out the time, temp, and pressure these would be fine. But if you want something lasting I would stay away.

~~~Now on to some secrets~~~
With all my projects I use liquid gesso first no matter what. Trust me get some cheap gesso it will save you some time and a few headaches. It's just an acrylic primer I got a 16 oz bottle on Amazon for around 10$. I've had it for months and only used maybe a quarter so far. Some are clear some have a white base. I suggest the white base saves you some more time.
I also see some people leave reviews saying the paint was coming up. I get the problem sometimes it's because I get impatient. Sometimes I don't let the first coat dry completely or it's already drying and I go over it again. I really don't know how to just leave it alone and walk away lol
If you want matte paint you can mix in some plaster of Paris. Also DecoArt makes something called chalk finish medium to mix on with your paint.

I've put together a bunch of the ROKR wooden puzzles, so my wife bought me this thinking it was similar. It isn't because it's carboard and I actually found it to be rather challenging. It consists of cardboard tabs that should fit into cardboard slots. Sometimes those slots don't seem to want to go into those slots and you can't really force them or you'll knock other pieces off. I'm not finished yet, I JUST began doing the masts for the sails and called it a night. I felt like the instructions could have been way better. For example, about halfway through the book, it kind of tells you to put the side panels of the ship on, but doesn't show you at all how to do it. It shows the panel installed, but from the other side of the ship. Almost like they got lazy while designing the book. Others mentioned the jaws on the front, yeah I ripped that part on accident. Kept looking at it and the poor directions and trying to see if I was doing something wrong. Luckily, I had some 2-sided tape and was able to make it work good enough. Glue would certainly be recommended for some parts. Also, be VERY careful with the cannons. 3 of them slipped out of the slots while I was assembling, and I don't want to take it apart to get into the center to fit them. I was able to get one back on. In hindsight, I should have glued them, but I didn't think of it. I also was wondering why I still had quite a few lights at the end of the strand. I'm positive I followed the directions properly, but still had extra which I thought could have been cool to illuminate other parts of the ship besides the port holes. I ended up burying them though, so oh well. It does look really cool, and I would do another for sure. Frustrating at times, the directions could certainly be better. I'll update if I find any other issues while finishing it, hopefully this weekend.

I would actually recommend placing a stiff object under the page while drawing with any tool so lines won't transfer to the next page. Front & back sketching may be a prob for pros as you may see shadows from one side to the other. But, as you can see, those shadows shouldn't really bother a beginner (I took pic with and without flash). I'd rather go into a store to buy a sketch pad on sale. I've not had a chance to look through everything to make sure everything was included. However, there's a lot included for the cost. My goal was to have a 3 yr old, two 6 year olds and myself (adult) manipulate, create, cook and review the process.

1st impressions. We are 1st time polymer clay users. The clay was a bit tacky but didn't stick to your hands like wet dough. It stuck to itself well and was easy to mold. The clay was firm enough to hold it's shape but not so hard that I had to help the children roll balls and coils. We did not use the specialty glue I bought (just in case after reading reviews that some items broke a part) because I wanted to see how these held up on it's own. Perhaps size matters in the durability of the finished product and these are all under 3 inches. But I'll let the kids play with them tomorrow and see if they fall to pieces.

Since I was firing 2 distinctly different sizes and didn't want the flat ones to scald, I heated the oven to 200 F and let them cook for 45 mins. The clay is hard but not rock hard. Next time, I'll try it at 215 F. But, there is no discoloration, melting or cracking that I could observe.

We used the tools but not the glitter, earring hooks and the like for this trial. But, we have a lot of time to explore the set. Based on today's experience, I would definitely buy this again. Everyone enjoyed the process and the creating.

...and FYI: each person received 2 colors and everyone had some left over that we wrapped in plastic when done. Included in the kit is a little book of directions sharing various gardening options and a few craft ideas to try. The kids found a few ideas to try next go around.

THE GOOD:
---------------
* 84 containers that fit into one large case.
* Clasps function properly. Easy to open and snap shut.
* You get 140 labels.
* They remind me of little tic-tac cases.

THE BAD:
------------
* The grids don't really keep the boxes in place because it's really shallow. Even when it's shipped to you, they are haphazardly placed in the box, and don't really follow the grids. Overall, I'll go 4-Stars.

THE GOOD:
---------------
* High quality, professional honeycomb accessory.
* 19.68" W x 19.68" D x .87" H.
* Very nice bottom metal sheet is provided.
* Perfect accessory for my Atomstack S10 Pro. In my pictures, you'll see how it fills up my engraving area perfectly.

THE BAD:
------------
* Competitors provide versatile clamps to hold down workpieces.
* Competitors provide anti-slip pads for the bottom of the honey comb. I would have rated this 5-Stars, but because it skimps out on accessories others provide, I'll have to knock off a star. 4-Stars.

I counted every piece, and it is indeed 6000. No, I didn't. I'm joking. LOL! I'll take their word for it. The bulk of the count are the flat clay beads, which they indicate are 4800 pieces. This is a nice complete set that not only includes the clay beads, but the decorative designs as well such as gold beads, letters, and various shapes as well. It comes in two plastic boxes, and has a nice retail packaging to it, which makes it giftable.
Many of these sets on Amazon come to you in plain clear cellophane, with no retail packaging. So if you're looking for something that's giftable, this is it. 5-Stars!

THE GOOD:
---------------
* Very cute. So many designs to choose from. My daughter gravitated towards this cola Panda.
* Canvas is 6"x6" and a wooden frame is included.
* Hanging hook already pre-installed in frame.
* Plate, jelly gum, pen, and of course all the diamonds are complete in the package.
* Perfect activity to get your kids away from tablets.

THE BAD:
------------
* Nothing at all. 5-Stars!

THE GOOD:
---------------
* So many accessory compartments.
* Measures about 23" x 7.5" x 7".
* Stitching and quality feels great.
* The zippers are also great quality.
* Should straps are detachable.
* Designed for all the newer bigger Cricut Maker and Explorer machines, but we're using this bag for our ancient Silhouette SD cutter. LOL!

THE BAD:
------------
* Nothing. This bag feels very robust. 5-Stars!

THE GOOD:
--------------
* 12 x 12, 80 sheets, 16 colors.
* Convenient "tear as you need" book.
* Cardstock quality, not printing paper thin.
* Perfect for arts and crafts.
* Perfect for saving ink. There are projects that sometimes require certain backgrounds to be printed. This is perfect!

THE BAD:
------------
* Nothing at all. 5-Stars!

Awesome quality! The beads are either square or round, and they are solid or translucent. The prints on them are perfect and clear, and they also come with a bag of 200 hearts for accent, as well as 200 number beads. The rest are 1600 letter beads, for a total of 2000 beads. We are newbies to bracelet making, and if you are too, one thing you should think about is organization. This may affect your shopping decision because there are kits available that comes with a sorting case. We didn't think about this, but luckily we have a tray laying around the house that has dividers, but we'll probably need something with a cover or lid to prevent spilling. Staying on the topic of newbies... we found it difficult to knot the elastic string. We even searched youtube tutorials for the strongest knots for these types of elastic cords. One of the tutorial we found was called the "surgeons" knot. I recommend you search youtube for knot tying tutorials if you are newbies like us. Again, it does not come with an organizer, the sorting tray in our pictures is not included.

I've been doing needlework for years and admittedly have been avoiding using a sewing machine because I simply thought it was too complicated for me to handle. I did Home Ec. in school and can vividly remember the horror of trying to machine sew that little bag so wasn't interested in going through that experience again.  Well, I found a pattern for a huge dragon that I decided I absolutely NEEDED (after all we all need a huge wearable dragon right?)  Anyway, that meant I had to learn to sew so broke down and bought my first sewing machine (this Brother) and at first attempted to read the manual and understand what I was doing from that - didn't quite get it, so watched the video - and no I have an almost completed dragon (well everything except for the rest of the stuff that will have to be done by hand (assembling parts, painting eyes, etc),  Now I don't know why I didn't try machine sewing years ago, it would have saved so much time on so many projects!  My only complaint is that the cord to the foot petal isn't long enough!  It reaches the floor but just barely and because of that the petal constantly turns unless I have my foot on it.
Just as expected!

These worked absolutely perfect for Sublimation. I wanted to do something a little different this year to welcome our Elf on the shelf back and saw this idea on Pinterest. As soon as I got the puzzle pieces in, I heated my press up to 196c and pressed it for 70 seconds. I did pre-press it for 10 seconds before pressing it. There's a little shimmer to these puzzles and are also made of really good material for being a puzzle. The pieces come apart without much effort so there's little to no tearing. They come 10 in a pack and are individually wrapped with a cardboard backing which is a huge bonus.

Arrived quickly and packed well. Although the box has several errors (spelling, grammer, etc) it doesn't take away from the quality of the actual product. Everything you need comes in the pack including 3 paint brushes of different sizes, something to hang your picture with when complete, paint, canvas and a little picture of what the end product will look like. The canvas is thick but when you paint on the surface of it the paint glides across. The paint is thick and sticks well to the canvas and a little bit goes a long way. it covers up easily as well so if you make any mistakes you can just paint over it with the next color and you won't have a problem. Highly recommend for anyone who is looking for time to kill and have a beautiful product in the end.

These arrived rather quickly. Each bottle has a tip that needs to be cut off before the first use to help prevent leaking during shipping. The colors are absolutely incredible. I dropped about 4 drops in my epoxy and it colored it fast and is very transparent. I've used them several times since I received them and am impressed how beautiful the colors are each time. I've used alcohol inks and acrylic paint in my epoxy before to try to achieve these colors and can't. These are perfect for coloring the epoxy while still allowing your work to be seen under.

This Resin Molds Heating Mat Kit is nice. I had my doubts that it would speed up the curing process, but it worked. I put my molds on the mat and covered them. I set the timer but after two hours my resin was fully cured. Normally it takes so long that I fill the molds and forget about them for a few days.

The box comes with a heating mat with an attached electrical cord. There is a small cord that attaches to the power cord that has a timer on it. There is a silicone mat and a pretty cover also included. Also included are cups, pipettes, a mixing cup, and a stir stick.

I will be recommending this Resin Molds Heating Mat Kit to family and friends.

This Washi Tape is nice. I will be using this on my handmade cards. I love all the different colors and designs.

The pack comes with 50 rolls of tape. Each roll has 5 yards of tape. There are 10 color sets in the pack, orange, burgundy, yellow, green light blue, dark blue, peach, pink, purple, and black. The color sets have 5 sizes of tape.

I will be recommending this Washi Tape to family and friends.

These Skin Colored Pencils are not worth the money. I did not like the way they looked in the portrait I am doing. This was very frustrating.

The box comes with twelve pastel pencils. The pencils are linden wood, and the lead is 4mm pastels. The pastel leads come in skin-tone colors.

I will not be recommending these Skin Colored Pencils to family and friends.

These Paper Punches for Crafting are nice. I love all the different designs. I am a crafter and sometimes I need just a little something to finish off my project. I did have a little problem with one of them sticking but it finally started working.

The box comes with 6 punches. Each punch has a different design, butterfly, leaf, pinwheel, star, circle, and heart. There is a little cover on the bottom to keep the cuttings inside, so they don’t go all over the place.

I will be recommending these Paper Punches for Crafting to family and friends.

This Designer Textured Paper is beautiful. The hardest part was deciding which one to use first. I chose two of the iridescent paper and they made my cards look fabulous.

The pack comes with letter size paper, 8.5 X 11”. There are 50 sheets in the pack. The paper comes with different textured patterns and 6 different colors. Each sheet is single-sided.

I will be recommending this Designer Textured Paper to family and friends.

This Proportional Divider Drawing Tool works great for getting proportions right. The value finder is helpful too. I use these often.

I have recommended this Proportional Divider Drawing Tool to family and friends.

These Polymer Clay Cutters are nice. I like all the different shapes. I used the teardrop mold and one of the small molds. I will need a little more practice with them before I am satisfied.

The pack comes with 23 molds in different sizes and shapes. There are also 10 cards for earrings and plastic bags to put them in. The pack also has ear wires, jumprings, and earring backs.

I will be recommending these Polymer Clay Cutters to family and friends.

This 300g Clear UV Resin Hard did okay. I used it with glitter, and it worked great. I added pigment and it didn’t work as expected. I used less pigment and still, it did not cure. Not impressed.

The box comes with 3 bottles of resin. Each bottle is 100 grams. The top has a place piece that was difficult to remove, and the plastic nozzle needs to be cut. It comes with two small cups and plastic sticks. Instructions are included.

I will not be recommending this 300g Clear UV Resin Hard to family and friends.

This UV Resin Kit w/ Light is great. The light works but is not great. I had another light that worked better. I made a pair of beach-inspired earrings. I only put in some gold sequins that looked beachy to me.

The box comes with a 100-gram bottle of UV Resin Hard and a UV Lamp with a USB cord. It also comes with two silicone jewelry molds, a mat, two stirrers, a measuring cup, two mixing cups, finger covers, 6 keyrings, and a small bag for ear wires. There is also a mixed bag of pendant frames, a small bag of jump rings, 5 cord necklaces, a pair of tweezers, and 3 bottles of pigment each is 10ml in the colors blue, red, and yellow. Also included are 5 packages of decorative accessories including 12 tubes of glitter, 12 tubs of flakes, a container with a variety of fruit slices, a pack of miniature bottles filled with sequins, and a pack of gold sequins. Instructions are also included.

I will be recommending this UV Resin Kit w/ Light to family and friends.

This LightGrip Cutting Mat worked great for me. I used it to cut out some miniature pillows. I was happy with the stickiness of the mat.

The pack has four mats inside. The sticky part of this mat is 12 inches by 12 inches. They all have clear replaceable covers on them. They are easy to clean.

I will be recommending this LightGrip Cutting Mat to family and friends.

This Polymer Clay Kit is nice. I haven’t worked much with polymer clay, but I loved working with this clay. I made several pieces using the mold. The first ones looked fair but thin. The next batch looked better. I plan to be working with this polymer clay.

The box comes with stackable containers. The containers have 82 packs of clay in assorted colors. Also included is a mold, clay working tools, a roller, a ring, a brooch, beads, and more. Instructions are also included.

I will be recommending this Polymer Clay Kit to family and friends.

This Blocking Mats for Knitting is great. I have some small blocks that I have been using for a while now, but they are limiting. These blocks are large and will work for many of my knitting and crochet projects.

The zippered plastic bag comes with 9 blocks that are 36.2 inches by 36.2 inches. They are thick and the pieces go together well. Also included are two packs of t-pins, and 100 colorful stitch markers. The plastic bag they come in has handles and can be used to store the mats and supplies when not in use.

I will be recommending this Blocking Mats for Knitting to family and friends.

This Diamond Painting Kits for Adults is beautiful. I love the look of the canvas. The drills are colorful and will make my diamond painting beautiful when I finish. So far, the canvas is sticky and holds the diamonds well.

The box comes with a colored canvas. The colors have a corresponding letter number in the legend. The drill packs have two sets of identifying numbers that are on the legend also. The drills are included in the box too. They are individually wrapped and easy to identify. A tray, pen, and sticky glue are also included in the box.

I have recommended this Diamond Painting Kits for Adults to family and friends.

This Soft Pastels Art Supplies Set is great. I love to draw and paint but I had not tried chalk pastels before. I loved working with them and will be doing more with them.

The box comes with 24 colors of chalk. Each piece of chalk is a little more than 2.5 inches long. Each one has paper wrapped around most of the bottom of the chalk. This chalk did blend well.

I will be recommending this Soft Pastels Art Supplies Set to family and friends.

This Iridescent Acrylic Paint is beautiful. It goes on smoothly and dries quickly. I am getting cards ready to be painted now. I used a brush with the paint for my sample and it is beautiful.

The set of paint comes in 16 beautiful colors. It comes in 2 oz plastic bottles, it has a flip-top but there is a plastic stopper in each bottle. The paint is acid-free and it is non-toxic.

I have already recommended this Iridescent Acrylic Paint to family and friends.

These Dyvicl White Ink Pens look great. I used them on black cardstock and they worked fantastically. I also used it to see if it would cover mistakes on white cardstock and it did. I will be using these pens a lot!

The pens are bright white. It is a pack of 12 fine point pens. These pens will look great on color paper or even over other makers if you need to cover something or to give a little detail over the paint or marker you have.

I will be recommending these Dyvicl White Ink Pens to family and friends.

These Dyvicl Acrylic Paint Pens are great. The pens actually paint. The colors are beautiful and I loved how they made my handmade cards pop. I love these pens!

The pens come in 24 colors. They are water-based and acid-free. These pens can be used on almost any surface. I will be trying them out on a canvas later.

I will be recommending these Dyvicl Acrylic Paint Pens to family and friends.

This CAMWAY Leather Hole Punch works great. I have used a revolving punch before but it was a long time ago. I made a sample piece and used the revolving punch to add a hole. I didn't add a rivet because this was just a small sample. I will be putting this to use very soon.

The kit comes with a revolving punch, leather punch pliers (looks like a paper hole punch), and several colors of rivets. It also includes a ruler, a small screwdriver, a grinding rod (looks like a file), two replacement pieces for the revolver. It is a great set for beginners.

I will be recommending this CAMWAY Leather Hole Punch to family and friends.

This Leather Craft Punching Pad worked great. I am new to leatherwork and found the pad and mat helpful. I had to come back to the description to find out what the mat was used for. I was able to make a small sample piece with the help of both the pad, the mat, and the steel aids.

The set comes with a punching pad, a cutting mat, and two steel diamond chisel aids. There is a QR code on the steel aids to show you how to use them. I found the video very helpful.

I will be recommending this Leather Craft Punching Pad to family and friends.

This ARTOYS Watercolor Paint Set is great. I used it to paint a few small things to try. The colors are vibrant and when mixed they worked perfectly for some flowers.

The set comes with 36 watercolor cakes and one tube of white. There is a paintbrush and a water paintbrush. Also, the set has a pencil and sharpener, two small sponges, and 8 pieces of watercolor paper.

I will be recommending this ARTOYS Watercolor Paint Set to family and friends.

This Epoxy Resin comes with everything I needed but the molds. I have jewelry molds and that is just what I used this epoxy resin for. I mixed it as directed and add some color and glitter and poured it into the molds. My earrings look great!

This kit comes with everything needed to start using it right away. You get resin and hardener, gloves, cups, string sticks, pipettes, and files. The kit comes with good instructions on the box and on the bottles. I used mine for jewelry but it can be used for many other things according to the description.

I will be recommending this Epoxy Resin to family and friends.

This Heflashor Glitter Adhesive Craft Vinyl sticks well. I do love the glitter look without the mess. I didn't have a problem cutting, using, or transferring this vinyl. I am very happy with it.

The vinyl comes in gorgeous color. The glitter is in the paper so you don't have the mess you do with other glitter paper. I will be using this more in my projects.

I will be recommending this Heflashor Glitter Adhesive Craft Vinyl to family and friends.

This Amazon Basics Palette Pad is perfect for a fast clean-up. I used it with acrylic paint and it worked perfectly. I was a little concerned that I would have a big job cleaning up but that was not the case.

The paper has a coating on it making it perfect for paint, even mixing with water. The paint did not seep through the paper. The paper is big enough for several colors or mixing colors on the pallet. I love it!

I will be recommending this Amazon Basics Palette Pad to family and friends.

This Mont Marte Oil Paint Set Signature 24pc has beautiful colors. I will be using them very soon. I did not plan ahead and I do not have anything to clean my brushes. I will get some things this weekend and will update this review if I have problems with the paint.

The one thing I noticed about the paint is that some of the paint names do not match the actual tubes. This may not be important but it is something that I noticed. Curious as to why that would be but I wasn't looking for a particular color or name.

I will be recommending this Mont Marte Oil Paint Set Signature 24pc to family and friends.

This Ohuhu Painting Canvas Panels did not do well for me. To start with, it says primed but when I applied the paint it didn't look or feel as if it was primed. I added two coats of gesso. When I began to paint a section of the board it looked like cardboard when it gets wet. Very disappointing.

The canvas panel comes individually wrapped which is nice. If I chose not to layer the panel might have done better but I usually layer when I paint. I did allow the paint and gesso to dry completely before adding a new layer. I tossed the panel in the trash.

I will not be recommending these Ohuhu Painting Canvas Panels to anyone.

This Amazon Basics Calligraphy Brush Pen works great. The fine tip gives me a good thin line for the upstroke, and with more pressure, the lower portion of the brush gives a wider downstroke. The description says there is a chisel shape on the opposite end. I did not have that.

I am not great at calligraphy but I am practicing often. These pens are perfect for me to practice because the tip is firm and thin. I have tried other pens that no matter what I do I can't get that thin line. I was able to do that with this pen.

I will be recommending Amazon Basics Calligraphy Brush Pen to family and friends.

This Canvall Flipbook Set for Drawing and Tracing Animation is really nice. I used to do animation like this when I was a kid, but I didn't have a lightbox. The only instructions are for the lightbox, not helpful since the description says 540 pages of loose-leaf paper but these are connected to, brads for something. There is a little tool included but not instructions.

The set itself is nice. You get almost everything you would need to do animation if you know what you are doing. There are no instructions on how to start, how to remove the "brads" or if I should remove them. The only instructions are for the small lightbox. A little tutorial would have been nice for beginners to know how to start.

I will be recommending this Canvall Flipbook Set for Drawing and Tracing Animation to anybody that asks about doing flipbooks. I think if they ask me they already know how to do it.

This Paul Rubens Art Supplies Watercolor Paper is great. The paint did not bleed through, which I did expect and prepared for. The paper did warp when after I finished my painting. I will be using this book as my holiday painting book.

The book itself is not put together perfectly. It was a little difficult to get the top opened enough to paint without breaking it. The pages though are another story, they are of good quality. I will be looking for full-size hot press watercolor paper soon.

I will be recommending this Paul Rubens Art Supplies Watercolor Paper to family and friends. It is a great way to watch your progress.

These MUJINHUA Metallic Marker Paint Pens have beautiful colors. I used a couple of colors and then I tried white. I was a little disappointed at first because it was so light. Before I replaced the cap the white darkened up and it worked great. I used it on a dark blue and in seconds the white was sort of bold on top of it.

These pens are perfect for paper crafter who want to add flourishes to cards or journal sheets. The colors are bold and beautiful. I plan to use these pens quite often in my card-making. The box says it can be used on glass and I may have to give that a try later.

I will definitely be recommending these MUJINHUA Metallic Marker Paint Pens to family and friends.

This Clear Casting and Coating Uv Resin worked perfectly. I was amazed that I just had to set it outside in the sunshine for it to cure. I didn't add enough resin on one of them but it still set great and will work for me.

The resin comes with a tip to attach to the top which made it very easy to put into my molds. The smell was not overpowering, although the packaging says odor-free it is not odor-free. My molds set up quickly and look great even the one I messed up by not adding enough resin.

I will be recommending this Clear Casting and Coating Uv Resin to family and friends and I will be purchasing more for myself.

This MUJINHUA Professional Drawing Sketch Pencils Set was great for sketching. I didn't find any gritty places in the pencils. That is a pet peeve of mine, gritty places to me means that the graphite has a bad place in it and it is scratchy on the paper. These pencils did not have that so to me they are of good quality.

I love the graduation from hard to soft graphite, they go from 4h to 12b. I use mainly the softer graphite but do use the hard graphite for the beginning sketch. I didn't have any problems with the pencils and I loved that they were sharp and ready to use right out of the pack.

I will be recommending this MUJINHUA Professional Drawing Sketch Pencils Set to family and friends.

This Zig Kuretake Calligraphy Practice Set with Water Pen is just amazing. I have been practicing off and on for a while and wasting paper and ink. I will be practicing more with this set. It is perfect for me!

I didn't believe this would work. The description said I could write with water and it would disappear and I could try again. It works great. I practiced several times with both hands. I am left-handed but I have trouble doing calligraphy with my left hand. I have found, with practice I am better at calligraphy with my right hand, and thanks to this set I will be able to practice often.

I will definitely be recommending this Zig Kuretake Calligraphy Practice Set with Water Pen to family and friends.

This Pebeo Drawing Gum is great. I was skeptical but it actually works. I applied it to mixed media paper. When the drawing gum was dry, I used watercolors to paint the paper and intentionally went over the drawing gum. When the watercolor was dry I removed the drawing gum. It was easy to remove and I did not get any paint in the area that had the drawing gum.

I like that it includes two sizes of paintbrushes. I will keep all of that together for future uses. The odor is not too bad and I was practically on top of it while applying it to my paper.

I will be recommending this Pebeo Drawing Gum to family and friends.

These 6-Pack 5D Diamond Paintings are disappointing. The canvas is not sticky enough. The beads move if you touch them. I know that when I finish I can put something heavy on it and that will fix the problem but while working it is very frustrating.

I have other problems with these paintings. First, the legend has the symbols and color but not the numbers listed on the packs of diamonds. I would have preferred the number associated with the packets instead of four pairs of tweezers. I find this very annoying. Next, some of the symbols look too much alike making it difficult to determine the correct color.

I will not be recommending these 6-Pack 5D Diamond Paintings to family and friends.

This Offito Diamond Painting Kits for Adults Kids says that it uses facets to reflect more light. I have to say, I can't see any difference in these diamonds compared to others I have used that do not say they are facets. The picture is beautiful and the painting looks great but not better than the others.

The back is very sticky and the diamonds stick well. I have not had a problem with any of them not sticky on any part of the adhesive. I have less than a third of the painting is finished and it is looking like I will have plenty of diamonds. I have to give the rating not because I didn't enjoy it or that I didn't think it was beautiful. I am giving this rating because of the wording. I ordered it thinking I was getting diamonds that were different than what I have been using and that was not the case. False information.

I will not be recommending this Offito Diamond Painting Kits for Adults Kids to family and friends.

This Stalente DIY Diamond Painting by Number Kits is very sticky. The diamonds stick to the canvas with no problems. The canvas is easy to read even without a lightbox.

The kit includes a beautiful canvas, 21 vibrant color diamonds, a tray, a pen, and wax. I love the round diamonds in this kit. The pattern is perfect for hanging as a Christmas decoration.

I will be recommending this Stalente DIY Diamond Painting by Number Kits to family and friends.

I was so happy to get this Manzawa Rainbow Washi Masking Tape. It has a rainbow of colors to choose from. I love that they were individually wrapped.

My box has shades of purple, shades of blue, shades of greens, a yellow, shades of pink, and, an orange. The tape is thin so it will work well on handmade cards, which is what I wanted them for. The variety of colors will make matching colors with cards stock easy. The one I tried stuck to the cards stock well and I was able to take it off and re-position it without tear the paper.

I will be recommending this Manzawa Rainbow Washi Masking Tape to family and friends.

This is such a great set. The PHOENIX 30-Piece Canvas Painting Kit has everything needed to get started painting. I love mine!

The set includes 5 stretched canvases, which I didn't use this time. A nice pallet with a hole for the thumb and several wells for the paint and places to mix paints. There are two pallet knives for mixing paints. 6 different size paintbrushes. Two graphite pencils and an eraser and a sharpener. Also included in the kit are 12 gorgeous colors of paint.

The paint is "Studio" by Phoenix. The colors are bright and flowed smoothly. For acrylic paint, it didn't seem to dry as fast as other brands I've used. I really enjoyed painting with them.

I will be recommending this PHOENIX 30-Piece Canvas Painting Kit to friends and family. I think they are great!

I have started this Diamond Painting Art Kit and I am really loving it. It is so relaxing. I think I am hooked on another craft! EDITED: This is the most frustrating diamond painting I have done to date. The diamonds will not stick to the canvas.

The beads in the diamond painting are beautiful and so far they all seem to be of very good quality. EDITED: The diamonds are of poor quality. They are different sizes and you can tell them more when either one is too large or one is too small. It is either crammed together or it has too much room all around it. The canvas is easy to read and very sticky (EDITED: the diamonds to not stick well at all!) allowing the diamonds to stick well. I love how all of the different diamonds are labeled and packaged. Included in the package other than the canvas and the beads are a tray to put your diamonds in while working with that color, a pen with two different ends, and the sticky stuff used to pick up the diamonds.

I will not be recommending this Diamond Painting Art Kit to family and friends.

I have just cast on two socks and I am knitting them on my ChiaoGoo 40" circular round needles. I love them, I don't know how I managed without them all these years. I would recommend these needles to socks knitters.
This is probably one of the best purchases I have made in a while. They have the perfect tips for knitting and the stitches flow smoothly over the connectors. I love them.
Great length for knitting two at a time pieces. Like socks, gloves or sleeves. I love it.
I purchased a set of interchangeable needles and I also order an extra cable 37 inches. I use it for knitting two at a time pieces. I love it.
Missing parts. Seems like a great deal. Our set was missing all of the jewelry portions though.
Some of the markers were dried out. They're inconsistent with the marks they make and have a tiny cartridge of ink. So even the ones that work nicely won't last long.
Everything was as described
Realistic
Coloring. The most beautiful inks I’ve ever seen.
Beautiful colors
Great size
Great set!
One was no good but amazon fixed the issue.
Very easy to use. Very hard after set.
Awesome product, bought 2.
Great stuff.
The product is not soft at all, even if you knead it really well and it gets a little dry/crumbles too.

My kid has sensitive skin & often her skin starts to get irritated with othe face paint products, not with thi though! I was worried because older reviews talked about how the faint the colour is or impossible to get any paint etc but it’s worked for me. There is a plastic covering on each colour so I wonder if those people took it off. Lol. Did a swatch only hand so you could see the vibrancy of the colours. Washed off simply with soap and water, no scrubbing needed.

My daughters enjoy jewelry making and they were very excited to get this set of chains, jump rings, and lobster clasps. The kit includes all of the items in 8 different colors. You get 6.5 feet of each of the chains. The chains can be used to make necklaces, bracelets, keychains, or virtually anything you can imagine. This is an excellent product that will allow you to create beautiful jewelry.

This is a very convenient pack of 72 permanent markers. I use these markers for a wide variety of jobs around the house. They're convenient for everything from marking a line on a piece of wood you're about to cut, to filling in shadows on an art project.

These markers have a nice tip that is easy to control. If you write with the tip you can use them for things like taking notes or signing autographs. You can also get a wide line if you turn the tip on its side. The markers are long lasting and easy to hold. This is a great bulk set of quality permanent markers.

This is a nice bottle of sealer glue for diamond paintings. It comes with a convenient applicator. All you have to do is squeeze the glue onto the painting and then rub it around with the sponge head. Applying the glue does not displace the colored stones from your project. The glue helps hold the diamonds firmly in place. This is a quality product that helps you put a durable seal on your diamond paintings.

This is a terrific bulk pack of hot glue sticks. These are the mini variety that fit in a smaller glue gun. My kids like to do arts and crafts so when these sticks arrived they got right to work. The pack includes 100 sticks that are 8 inches in length.

This is a very nice set of drawing supplies. It comes in a quality canvas case that zips closed. The case allows you to keep all the items organized and fits easily into a backpack.

The set includes a wonderful assortment of colored pencils, watercolor pencils, charcoal pencils and more. All of the items and accessories are of good quality. This would be a great drawing kit to take with you on a hike. It even has a place for a small sketchbook.

This item is perfect for children and would make an excellent gift idea. It is a well-organized, high quality drawing kit that will help bring out your artistic side.

This product provides you with a huge supply of epoxy resin. You get one gallon of resin and one gallon of hardener. The product comes in plastic jugs that are durable and appropriate for storage. It's important to mix the resin and hardener at a 1 to 1 ratio. Take time to stir for several minutes and don't forget to scrape the sides of the container while mixing.

I always have the best luck with epoxy resin when I mix at an ambient temperature above 75 degrees. This epoxy resin kit is perfect for artwork and other projects. This is a high-quality product with plenty of household uses.

This is a 24 pack of brilliantly colored soft pastels. It is fun to work with these because they allow you to make striking images that leap off the page. This set of pastels is perfect for professional artists, but it's also a nice choice for creative young people. My daughters love working with pastels because you can use your fingers to mix the colors together on the paper. Working with pastels is a wonderful way to relax. This is a great product that will help you explore your creativity and create beautiful artwork.

This is a very nice epoxy resin kit. It provides a large quantity of resin and hardener and the bottles are clearly labeled for convenient preparation. I've had the best success when I mix the resin when the ambient temperature is at least 75 degrees. The final result is strong, durable, and beautiful. This is a perfect kit for a variety of uses. The packaging is very nice and makes this kit a suitable gift idea.

I got this for my daughters and they have really enjoyed it. In the past they've used clay that you had to bake in the oven, however baking clay gives off a poor odor. This clay air hardens and is much easier to work with. The kit comes with a variety of tools to safely flatten, cut, and shape the clay. There are a huge variety of colors and your kids can have fun making wonderful creations. This clay set is the perfect way to ignite your children's imagination.

This is a terrific set that will make any artist happy. It comes in a very nice wooden case that is well organized and serves as a supply station while you are working. I got this for my two girls and after they are done painting, they know to put all of the pastels, pencils, and paints back in their rightful place in the box. This helps ensure that they can always find the colors that they need, there's no mess after working, and that they don't lose anything.

The set comes with a good variety of colors in acrylic, oil, and watercolor paints. There is also a nice selection of colored pencils, watercolor pencils, drawing pencils, brushes, and erasers. This kit really has everything you need to introduce your children to a wide variety of artistic mediums.

The case is durable and attractive, and this is the kind of kit that can spark a lifelong love of art. This is a very nice product and would make an excellent gift.

This paint set comes with 24 vibrant colors, 10 brushes, and 2 canvases. The paint containers are superior to what you find in most sets. Each one has a flip lid and you can easily squeeze out the paint without risking any damage to the container. The flip lid allows plenty of control and ensures the rest of the paint in the container will not dry out before the next use. This is a very good set especially for young kids who can't handle tubes of paint.

The paints blend well and can be used to make wonderful images. This set provides a huge volume of paint for the money. If you're just getting started with painting, or you want to give your kids a creative outlet, this is a very good set of acrylic paints to get you started.

I got this clay kit for my children and they have been absolutely delighted with it so far. The moment it arrived they dug in and began creating figurines of characters from the Harry Potter and Star Wars films. The kit comes with a wide variety of colors, and provides the tools necessary for very detailed sculpting.

Once the figures are made, it's easy to place them in an oven and harden them up. The instructions are easy to follow, and cooking the clay does not create any discernable odor. It is always nice to discover a product that pries children away from digital screens and encourages their creativity. This product would make a terrific gift.

This is a very nice sketchbook. The pages are thick enough that you can use a variety of art materials without having to worry about colors bleeding through. I like the texture of the paper. It is pleasant to draw on and it's easy to erase mistakes. The sketchbook is a good size. It's large enough that you can do a nice mini-painting, but small enough that you can slide it into a backpack or even a large jacket pocket. The cover is thick enough to ensure your sketches are protected. The pages have a perforated edge, so you can easily remove your drawings once you have finished. This notebook is the perfect size for sketching hand-crafted cards and thank you notes.

As a parent, I'm always on the lookout for any activity that can get my children to put aside their screens for a while. This Origami kit turned out to be the perfect pastime for kids who were stuck inside on a rainy day. The papers are very colorful, and the designs on the pages serve as a guide for folding. The accompanying book comes with instructions that are very easy to follow. A couple of the projects were a little too complex for my 9 and 6 year old girls, but that gave them the opportunity to come to me for help. Overall, we really enjoyed playing with this kit. The kids were very proud of the paper projects they created.

This is a terrific desktop item if you routinely have to assemble lengthy manuscripts. The item works either with 6 AA batteries or with the included power cable. I prefer the power cable because when the item is plugged in, I always know where it is.

There is a paper guide on one end that is clearly labeled and easy to use. The power button on the top is large and works smoothly. There is a compartment on the bottom that collects the punch holes for easy removal and disposal. This is a great three hole punch and perfect for any office setting.

This resin is a great choice for a variety of art products. It's really easy to work with as long as you follow the instructions precisely. I always go down to the dollar store to buy clean containers for mixing and then throw them away after use. I also recommend using a kitchen measuring scale when mixing so you are sure you get the perfect 1 to 1 ratio. I usually try to add just a touch more hardener than resin to make sure the epoxy forms up correctly.

This product has some self leveling properties, but it's important that you spread it out as evenly as possible. I always purchase a rubber spreader from the dollar store for this. You have about 30 minutes of work time after mixing, so you have to work fast. It dries overnight, but you get a better result if you work in a warm room. Don't leave it outside in the garage if temperatures are going to drop below 70 degrees or so.

The result is a hard, transparent, and protective surface that makes your project look great. This set is ideal for home crafts and a variety of surfaces.

This set contains everything you need to create wonderful illustrations. The set comes in a protective carrying case that zips up and has elastic bands to hold all the elements in place. The case allows you to keep your art supplies organized, and makes it easy to replace the items that wear out. I like that the set includes a pencil sharpener and even comes with a sketch pad so you can get started right away. The watercolor pencils are very versatile for adding coloration to any sketch, and the graphite pencils allow you to sketch out outlines and create shadows. This sketch makes it very easy to practice your art on the go and would make a thoughtful gift for anyone in your life who appreciates art.

A good starter kit that comes with all the basic materials to get you going in a great hobby. Needles were good, none broke as I used them. Wool was good as well, it had no bad odors or mold, which can sometimes be a problem with other companies. One was a little less than 5g but several others were slightly more, so I definitely got the 75g of wool. Overall, I'd recommend to a beginner.

The rainbow crystals absolutely sparkle like crazy in the sun and I'm in love with them! The sticky on the back works well and holds the crystal strip on as it should. All in all, I'm very impressed with these gorgeous rainbow strips!!

I got this string because this type of string is my cat's FAVORITE toy. I keep it put up in fear that he'll swallow it but when he wants to play, I pull out the strings and he starts playing and chewing them. He LOVES the strings from this kit!

Very pretty and vivid colors. String seems to be good quality.

Such beautiful washi tape, I really love the theme and colors. I love these designs so much, I'll almost certainly get more once I run out. I use washi tape mostly for paintings, to keep the edges clean; and it works well for that. You get so many different designs and for the price, a lot of tape.

I wish the washi tape had sliver instead of gold, it would look better with the theme and colors. But I've never seen washi tape in silver, so I guess it just isn't done. I do find it funny that a couple of the tapes are snowflakes, but hey, it's Christmas time, so they'll get use too. lol

Very cute book. The cloth cover makes it feel fancy. The paper was real nice, and I used it for both colored pencil and gouache. The elastic band is not too tight or loose and the included pocket on the inside came in quite handy. I love it's handy size and look forward to filling it out completely over time.

Very beautiful pictures, this company never disappoints in their choices. I have bought many from this company and love the kits very much. They are high quality, and include everything needed. They even pre sort the thread for you. I was very happy with this kit, and I will continue to recommend this brand.

Beautiful soft yarn in lovely colors. Each skein I got of this had small bald patches here and there. But were otherwise fine. Although pretty expensive, this bulky yarn can make anything look good, and be whipped up in a jiffy. It was nice to work with and the finished project is very warm. Worth it if you want really nice baby blanket, scarf etc.

Very soft and beautiful yarn. I really enjoyed one of the skeins I got. It was so nice to work with and I imagine you could make almost anything and it would look so nice. However, one skein I got was very badly damaged, looking like it had been caught in a machine, all throughout the skein. It was completely useless. For how very expensive this yarn is, I expected better.

We've cast several different color combinations of these and poured several- they all came out unique and beautiful! We put some little coins in them and put them on display with some other pirate decor I have. Very easy to make these and I love that you can choose any color you want for them, add glitter, etc- the sky is the limit with these little chests!

Huge balls of yarn. I originally saw them in the picture next to a crochet hook, and thought they would be small, but if you look at the pic where one is in a persons hands, you see these are actually very big indeed. I'm so glad I grabbed these to try out, this is just so much yarn. It also comes with a nice canvas bag that is big enough to hold all three balls at once or your WIP.

Very soft and warm chenille yarn, that would be perfect for a blanket, or anything you wanted to make really. Very easy to work with, and no breaks in the balls I got. Very beautiful colors, the dark teal I got looks just like it did on my screen. Very happy with this, and will likely get even more later. A little pricey, but highly recommended.

This was such a nice yarn to work with. Each skein only had one knot at most and the color was great. The yarn is soft but also, idk almost squishy soft as well. Would be good for just about any project I can think of.

Beautiful looking soft yarn with good color. Was not easy to work with for the most part, and it's too easy to break. It's fluff also falls out easy as well. If you get this, be very gentle with it. Although you can work with it, it's too much effort, especially for the price.

Beautiful and soft yarn. It has a nice stretch to it, and the colors are identical to what was pictured. It's a very nice wool and I have enjoyed working with it. I would get it again for sure if I need it. It does have the usual smell wool has, but it's really very light.

One of the softest yarns I've ever felt. It's fur effect is very good looking, and I have made some incredible amigurumi from this and I just can't imagine them looking any better with any other yarn. Would make for some fabulous edging on clothes, or a scarf. The balls are an ok price, right now, buying multiple two packs is better than buying the bigger pack. The yarn itself is I would say a two or three weight, but with a lot of fur, not a six weight.

Absolutely amazing product. I have used them for fangs for a costume, in crafts and home repair. To make temporary items that I could just melt down after I no longer needed them. Really, the only limit is your imagination. Having a plastic that I can form as I need but have the strength to do what I want it to is great. But being able to reuse it endlessly is just fantastic.
Used this to make a few little molds to pour wax into and it worked great for that! Very easy to use for beginners even.

I have always loved everything I have got from Himi, but this pad was a disaster. Mine was super wavy, and at first I couldn't think of why. But I noticed pressed into both the back and the front, the spirals of other pads, pressed so hard against the pad that it left marks several pages in, and left the book super wavy. I have tried so hard, but I can't get the paper flat, so it's useless to me, with how I use my paper.

Himi is my favorite brand of jelly gouache. It's just so good for student grade gouache. Opaque, bright and such beautiful colors. It dries well, rewets well and lasts so long in the case. I do open it every few months to mist it, if I haven't used it. Works well thick but can also be watered down a ton as well. Always fun to use this gouache, and I love the included brushes. It also lasts so long, I'm sure by the time I fill up my art book, I'll have barely put a dent into the paints.

Beautiful colors that go down easily, and dissolve under water very well. Thick cores give you a lot of bang for your buck. Love that they are lightfast. I have been using these for a while now, and far prefer them over any of the other brands of water color pencil I have. They are very expensive though compared to the others I have used.

A good value for how many pencils you are getting, plus a nice case that holds them all. Not the best quality pencils I have ever used, but the ones I'm comparing them to are so many times more expensive, and don't have as many colors. They are still decent quality though, don't get me wrong. It comes with a chart you can fill in with all the colors and I really like when a company gives you one, so I don't have to make one myself. They are softer, and very blendable. I haven't had any break.

For the price, these are good. Would be great for a beginner, or just something to practice with, so you don't use your best pencils on practice. I have been using in coloring books, and on my own art works, and have been enjoying having so many colors to choose from.

All the stickers I got were well centered and cut. Very shiny and holo, loved that. Thick, and have good sticking power. The designs are very lovey and imaginative. They can of course be used in any way you use a regular sticker, they don't have to be just for resin. Though they work very well in resin. I really loved mine, and I would absolutely recommend them to anyone looking for pretty holo stickers.

A nearly perfect kit for beginners. It has just about everything you'll need to get knitting or crochet. (though it does have a lot of items used just for knitting, it does not include knitting needles.) More sizes of hook under 1mm than I even knew existed. Everything inside is high quality. I have been using this kit nonstop for two months now and just love it. I do find it odd to have the hooks in the bare metal style, and another of the same size in the fancy style, with the nice handles. Normally, you would just upgrade to the nicer hook and not need the basic one anymore.

Sadly, my case (Which is super cute.) came with what looks like a streak of grease on it, and I have tried to get it out, and nothing works. It's small, but I wish it wasn't there. Also, I got this in part to get the larger hook sizes, but the 9mm and 10mm are the exact same size as the 8mm. If you look at the picture, you see that each size gets larger, as they should, but the 9mm and 10mm don't get bigger than the 8mm. I used my digital calipers to double check and even did a test swatch with each size. The three hooks are all the same size, and that is very upsetting.

I like the brand itself, but these designs are what really knock it out of the park. Spooky Halloween? Yes please. They stick great, and also remove without tearing the paper up. So I've used it mostly for taping up the edges of paper when I water color, and it's worked so well for that. I'm so glad to have found this set of washi tape and if you are needing any spooky washi tape for yourself, then I definitely recommend getting this set.

I have made paracord items for years now, and I always did it the hard way, because I couldn't afford the proper tools. But I had a list of all the ones I needed, and when I came across this set, it had everything, and for a really good price. I went ahead and got it expecting poor quality, but everything in here has been used for almost a year and I can say for sure, it is very high quality and still looks as good as new. I absolutely recommend this.

Great for crafts and miniatures. I had been wanting something like this for a while and was glad I grabbed a bag of it when I came across it. I have been able to use it in so much, and it has stayed green and looks completely natural (Because it is natural.). It's really made my miniatures look so much better, and I recommend it for any crafts that need a touch of natural green.

This isn't the BEST but the price absolutely reflects that so it's fine. It's a great budget engraver and does a pretty good job! I've used this for multiple craft projects and sold my crafts at craft shows- people love them! As with any engraver, it's a little to set it up and learn to use it but once you figure it out, it's smooth sailing and great!

Seems to be of good quality and decently made.

Great quality heat press. It was easy for this beginner set up and start using. It's don a fantastic job on multiple projects and I've had zero problems with it! Seems to be very well made and durable.

Such a nice washi tape, it's almost a shame to use it all up. I used most of mine for watercolor, to hold the paper down and keep some areas white. It's worked very well in that regard. I will have to get more someday, as I really do like the patterns.

I always love and recommend Himi gouache. This set is no different in that regard. This set does however include brushes and palette knives. I got this for the paint brushes and I have used them quite a bit and really enjoy them. The knives from the few times I have used them seem to be pretty good as well.

Great pencils, and very awesome coloring pages. The book was very high quality and I loved every image. The pencils themselves worked just as expected. Definitely a step up from kids brands. Not as good as the very best brands, but who can afford those? These are affordable and very good for the money. No breakage, no bloom and you can layer for a long time.

Breathtaking and stunning. I'm shocked by how good this bag looks, and even more so that's it's just for my pencils. Absolutely fabulous and I love it so much. It's my main bag for all my favorite pencils. It fits all my good pencils, and that's a lot. I will say though, it can be hard to get some of the pencils out of the outer pages, because of how deep the slots are in the bag, but I can get them out ok if I pay attention to those ones (And I keep the colors I use less often there as well.).

This mold makes a lot of cute little gems. I use them for custom colored counters mostly, but they helped fill up a friends treasure chest and it looks so good. They have also been good for scattering around displays to brighten them up. Great for so many little things and can also be good for using up left over resin.

A good price for a metal version that will surely last you forever. It's very accurate and it's so nice to finally be sure of both my ring size and my husbands. It also came in handy to figure out the size of a few rings we were unsure of.

I love everything about this paint, like how well it goes down on paper blends and can be rewetted down the line to keep working it as needed. It's great for me and I would recommend this to anyone just starting out in gouache or who just wants to paint for fun.

Got these to use for my crochet and needlepoint, but they work well for other crafts too. It's enough I won't need any more again, as they are great quality, I expect they'll last me forever. This is a great price for these as well and they came quickly.
This isn't the thickest art binder, it's kinda flimsy. But it holds art decently and seems well enough made. I suppose it's not a terrible deal for the price/ quality. No problems with it at all.

Love that I can make these as tall or short as I need. They have all come out so beautifully. Whether I use just plain color, mica or other add ins, they just look so good. They also have a benefit of going with most décor styles. I'd recommend not adding too much water or it'll come out the sides, but if you have that much water in the pot, you're killing the plant for sure.
Very good quality, easy to use. Worked great with my cricut machine and I've had no issues with the stencil film. Used it for multiple projects and they've all come out perfect! Highly recommend.

I used gouache with this, and it worked very well on it. It does buckle some, but not very much and that is fixed by wetting the back very lightly and evenly. Taping before hand also helps. Though, the buckling was not that bad, but I thought it might be helpful to some to say. Anyway, the paper is quite thick and is evenly textured. Also tested it with coloring pencils, and although they work fine, the bumpy surface of the paper really wasn't made for them.

I used my markers on white paper only, as I have no black paper. That being said, I loved the markers, they were bold and very shiny. They have been great for lettering, highlights and just drawing in general. These are overall, ok markers.

Great quality beginner kit. It's not top of the line but neither is the price! This is great for someone on a budget or someone just starting out as you might not enjoy the hobby and move on quickly.

I've used this to airbrush a few things and used it to airbrush a couple cakes even! It's done great each time and we got great results! Very easy to setup and use and it's not hard for a beginner to figure out at all! Definitely recommend this kit!

The back is SUPER sticky so if you clean your surface well with something like alcohol and let it dry- this will stick on there and isn't coming off anytime soon! The crystals are glass and they sparkle like crazy! Very beautiful!! Very easy to use and the result is just stunning!

This products does not like cheap paper at all, and even quite a few mid grade papers. But has worked perfectly on my highest quality papers. Keep that in mind when deciding to buy this or another. On good paper, it worked just as it should and left me with perfectly white areas to go over. It was also able to do thin lines just fine.

Great basic sewing kit at a fair price. Nothing in here is "premium" quality but it's acceptable quality and there's a good variety of threads and tools here! Definitely recommend every house to have a kit like this one!

Very useful to have around and I always recommend to have some. It's very versatile in what you can use it for, so almost anyone can find a use for it, especially crafters. This resin cured quickly and all the way through with a UV light, just as it should. It was clear and lower in odor than others I have used.

A great set to start out with. It heats up very quickly, worked quite well and I love how much it comes with. I can't imagine needing anything more than what it comes with, yet it all fits nicely within the included case. Highly recommended for beginners.

This fit more than I thought it would. It can very easily hold all the balls of yarn I'm currently working with, as well as a good deal of others I always swear I'll get to using. The sewing, and zipper on mine were perfect and I haven't had any complaints about the quality of this item. I love the front pouch and it will hold a great deal of needles and accessories, all that you would need for even a large project.

All of these measuring tapes are great quality and work great! Very happy with this kit. They came in a little resealable bag too which is nice! I am forever needing to measure something with a flexible tape so this will be a great thing to have.
This pigment is just beautiful!! Very metallic and just a stunning shade of aqua! Definitely recommend this product, great quality!

So much clay in this kit, and it's all very vibrant and soft. Easily able to work this and make fun things, and they baked fine; no cracks or burnt spots. Would be good for kids. My case came cracked however.

For the price, these are a truly amazing set for any beginner or hobbyist. They are very waxy but did not bloom on me, and they layer very well, doing best with gradual layers, but can be burnished as well. There are a ton of colors and they are all very beautiful. There are many colors that are so close, it's hard to tell them apart, but they are different. There was a slight smell, but that's normal for these kinds of pencils and it wore off quickly.

This paint is going to be great for anyone new to watercolor and just wanting to practice and try stuff out before moving on to the more expensive stuff. This is an affordable way to get a lot of colors all in one handy set.  Could also be good for older kids. The tray inside my case (that the paint sits in) was broken really badly. Since the outside of the case is fine, I have to assume it was just put in there broken. It does still work perfectly fine however, and all the parts of the case that matter are in good shape.

These have been so great to have. I love how they save me from throwing tons of plastic in the trash, which saves me money as well as helping the planet. These have been used a lot and still look new, so I expect they're going to keep holding up for a very, long time. Also love how many you get, so I can use multiple colors in one project, or even do more than one project at a time.

A good amount of paint for the money, as well as a decent range of colors. I like that the paint pots come out, so you can rearrange them or just take one or two out to use at a time and not have to have the whole set taking up space on your desk. The pigment is pretty good on these and better, the less water you use. The level of shine is fantastic. Very happy with these and their overall quality.

For what you pay, it's pretty great. It's not the best quality airbrush ever, but those are super expensive. This one will work perfectly fine for anyone that doesn't need the absolute best airbrush. It did everything I asked of it perfectly, and I had no problems with it at all. So many things it can be used for, so I do recommend getting one.

On the sheet that has 10 molds in it, there are some molds with flaws, excess silicone in them. The noses in a couple of them have a strange spot in the middle (may be intentional?) The skull with the crown on it has excess silicone hanging too. And sadly most of all, the man to the top left- he his mold goes all the way thru the backside so if we poured resin in it, it would just leak out. So the one mold on the sheet of 10 is unusable. I got this mainly for the coffin mold and it's really nice so I'm still keeping it. Honestly my biggest suggestion would be to buy the coffin mold separately if you can find it- the little molds in this are kind of dinky and cheap. But the coffin is perfect and well done which is the saving grace of this set.

Mine did not come with the extra smaller bottle, which is a shame as it would have been useful to have. The ink itself is magnificent. Jacquard is a wonderful brand and I love this ink very much and very highly recommend it to others that want high quality inks. The shine and shimmer of their silver color just can't be beat.

So good to use this on miniatures and dioramas. I love having a resin that stays workable as long as I need it to, but sets just as soon as I want it to. Very good quality resin, and I love the accessories it came with, they were all really useful.

A large range of common size needles, for a really great price. It also comes with so many little pieces, that although not strictly needed, are handy to have. It all fits quite nicely inside a little case as well to keep it all together and organized. This is great for anyone starting out to get a good collection of hooks.

I opened the box and the powder was EVERYWHERE. I spent forever cleaning it off the pouches. I then saw that at least half of them have holes in them and it almost looked as if someone put stickers on the bags and then ripped them off, making a hole where they were. So once we wiped them down, we attempted to tape over the holes but the mica powder just coats everything and it makes it to where the tape won't stick. I honestly don't know what to do about the leaking bags now and it's very frustrating. This didn't happen in shipping as they are sent in a nice thick cardboard box and then inside of whatever Amazon puts them in to ship. Ours were put in a bubble envelope but inside of that is this thick cardboard box that isn't bent, smashed, or anything! So this says without a doubt, those holes in the bags happened from the company that made these.

Aside from the huge leaking problem, they're BEAUTIFUL colors and work great with resin! Just need to fix the hole problem!

Such an incredible amount of shine and a great range of colors. Very stunning and enjoyable. A few of the colors were more sheer than the rest, but they all did well, and it's something that seems to be common with metallic paints. I'd suggest an undercoating with colors similar to what you'll use in the metallics or plan to go in again for another coat. I would like it to be better pigmented to prevent the bother of multiple coats.

The paint is only as thick as a sheet of paper, maybe two at best. I could see the bottom of the pan in some of the colors. I really did not expect that at all. I really was shocked at how little was in the pans. Too many of the colors are nearly identical and they will all need to be put on an already colored piece, as they are very sheer. However, they are very shimmery. They light up so beautifully, it's stunning.

Do not use the styrofoam forms. They are there I think to help you use less wool, but it's not worth it. I stabbed the foam so many times it turned to powder, which not only left my figure hollow and limp, but it started coming out and getting stuck all in the wool. There was so much wool left over, I very easily could have just made it without the foam at all, and wish I had. It just would have been a little smaller.

The wool was clean though, and the figures are cute.

Very impressed with the quality of these watercolors! I love them! For the price, these are great artist quality paints and you can't beat them in this price range! The color goes on smooth and the pigment is nice and even. Truly can't ask for more in a watercolor paint set!

These work perfectly and the price for the set isn't bad at all! The bristles are all set really well in place and they're really soft. No bristles falling out or anything of the sort. Overall I'm very impressed with the quality of these and definitely recommend them!
Fair price, these work great! Glad there are 6 so I can mix each cup with different colors instead of having to mix them one at a time otherwise. Easy to clean up. These are just great little cups!

Love these dual tip markers! You have many many colors in this set and get to choose which side of the marker works best for your project. They all work great and we've had zero problems with them. These markers are absolutely as nice as some of the big name brand art markers out there. Definitely save some money and give these a shot!

Took a little trial and error with the cutting but nothing unbearable! Definitely LOVE this machine and have had a blast using it! It's kind of addictive and I find myself just printing stuff for the fun of it now. Does well cutting words and does well cutting images too. Love this machine! Definitely a must-have for crafters and scrapbookers!

Love that you get 80 different markers in this set and that they have 2 different sides to them- this kit is amazing! they have the fine tip on one side and the chisel tip (like a highlighter) on the other end. Very handy for various pictures/ projects I've done!

The colors have been working flawlessly and are pretty good quality! I think for most people these markers are just perfect for anything you'll need! Definitely recommend them.
2 used clays and thought it was new. This was Christmas gift so I had not opened when it was delivered  :( i just wished I knew ahead of time.
It was very hard but overall it was awesome to use
Good pencils, great assortment and my kids love them.

This is a decent set with a great selection of colors. It is a good value if you want a quick and easy to grab set of pre sharpened colored pencils for casual drawing and coloring. The pencils feel nice and have a good weight to them, they are decently thick and provide an average pigment when used.

These aren’t professional quality but for the price I wouldn’t expect them to be. The holder is great and there are plenty of colors to use and create with. This would be a great gift for a kiddo who loves to color and would fit in most stockings perfectly.

This is a great set of brushes for the price point. I haven’t had any shedding and they work great for both my acrylic and tempura paints. They are easy to clean, though red can stain a little but (may be my fault as it was on there a little longer than desired).

There are so many shapes and styles that it really lets you get precise and exactly the stroke you are looking for. Very nice set!

This is a great value for a three pack of mats! They are easy to clean and the perfect size for kids projects or smaller adult projects. We have ours designated for activity by color.

These have held up great even with rough handling from our kiddos. Everything has cleaned off of these great from acrylic paint to glue to clay.

I will be getting more of these for other activity sheets and for parties with lots of kids!

This is honestly a must for a kids craft supply collection. There are so many pieces and ways to use them. Just grab some school glue (or hot glue gun if they’re old enough) and the things you can make are endless. I am a play therapist and having a solid set of art supplies for clients to make and create with is a necessity in my office. This is a great base for kid’s to use and is an invitation to play and create. I love to pair this with cardboard paper towel rolls, little dollar store ceramic pots, brown paper bags (to make puppets), and to decorate baked clay creations.
A lot of the clay packages were open
brilliant color

I purchased this to make jewelry for my craft business. It is super sticky after conditioning, sticks to the acrylic block. It’s almost as soft as sticky bread dough. Can not be shaped into a cane. Even after putting in freezer it smashes when cut. Would be ok for kids but not for any artist.

[[VIDEOID:eb472dba76b09e95afcd58dd26b84a9c]] The worst quality of yarn and the printed pattern on the fabric does not match the instruction guide. I’m having a horrible time filling in the flowers. You can not follow the instructions at all.  The picture of the finished product on the package is NOT what your final product will look like. It is an actual tufted rug with short tight yarn. This can NOT be used as a rug. Maybe a round pillow or wall hanging. Very very disappointed.
These are perfect. They are soft yet strong. The squeeze to fit 14 oz cups to 35 oz cups. I love them. Will be buying more soon.
This kit keeps all my supplies in 1 area. I store my smaller pieces on the light pad and put inside this bag. I took it on vacation with me it was amazing.

Soho offers quality acrylic products for artists and great prices. This versatile gel medium is no exception. It has an excellent consistency, goes on easily, and dries clear. Good for transfers, smooth glossy finishing, paint extension, and all other gel medium applications. Comparable to well-known brands.

Sturdy, well-made stencils for every craft or even fine art application (collage artists, take note). The letters are cleanly cut and classically designed.

Use them for posters, artworks, decor, craft items--the only limits are your imagination.

Also good for students and teachers.

This vellum is sized to fit in an inkjet or laser printer. It's a substantial weight, yet transparent enough for tracing with or without a lightbox. It also is great as an elegant overlayer when shipping or storing artwork.

If you need vellum for special invitations or mailings, this is a great deal.

The only problem, and it isn't really a problem, is the super-strong adhesive used on the sturdy yellow envelope containing the paper. I put a piece of paper over it so I wouldn't have to wrestle with it every time I wanted a few sheets. No big deal. You might even like it to seal that tightly.

This is wonderful vellum for all vellum applications at a super price!

A layer of soft fabric covers the firm blade of this specialized squeegee. It allows you to smooth out bubbles in decals and transfers without scratching delicate surfaces. It fits in your hand for perfect control.

Great for yourself, or a handy gift for a crafty friend.

Rock painters, sign makers, and crafters will enjoy this set of markers. They have bold, opaque, free-flowing ink with sturdy medium tips. In addition to black and white, there are gold, silver, and fluorescent colors. The red, blue, and green are saturated hues. There are also two tints--a green and a light purple.

Be sure to start the ink flowing in each marker by pressing on a firmly-supported scrap page. It really gushes out the first time you press. The ink is very opaque and it dries almost instantly. The light colors are especially vibrant on dark surfaces.

Whether you are a rock painter, a sign-maker, a crafter, or a mixed media artist you will find something to love about this set of acrylic paint markers. The ink is highly pigmented and flows easily from firm tips. The listing says they are fine-pointed, but the tips are closer to medium. You can get a relatively (not extremely) fine line after the initial flow of ink abates. The line quality is nicely variable with practice and these pens are fantastic for fill. The pens are fatter than most and easy to hold.

An inspiring gift for all artists past toddlerhood. So much fun!

The ink in these medium-tipped pens flows freely, but even white covers over dark paint and surfaces. The caps fit tightly, so they don't dry out easily between uses. the tips are firm and rounded. They produce a consistent line weight. When you first use them each time, start on a scrap surface because they might make an unwanted pool if you press. Once the ink is flowing, that doesn't happen.
