I do not sew a whole lot and am far from a professional. I have used this machine extensively and it has done absolutely everything I’ve needed and it is obvious it can do far more than I have the skills to perform.

I’ve used this machine to perform many basic sewing tasks - hemming pants and curtains, joining pieces of fabric together and even adding pockets to a pair of sweatpants.

While this sewing machine has performed everything I need it requires very little space - which is awesome. As an artist who works in many different mediums I have tools and supplies for each. I appreciate the fact this requires such a small footprint yet is capable of doing everything I need and more.

Outstanding product.

I developed a process of sculpting leather over25 years ago and I’m always looking for ways to add new concepts into my line of products. I have worked with different hardware for many years and when I saw this set I was interested in mixing the dual tones together.

This set comes with all that you need to add rivets to many items - though it could be challenging if your material is very thick. Understanding how these work, I knew what leather was best suited for using these and they worked exactly as I thought they would. If this is your first time working with rivets, I suggest practicing on a scrap piece to get an idea of the process - while not difficult, there is an art to pressure applied to the rivet to completely lock it in place.

I have found this set to be useful and easy to work with in my applications. The rivets have held up well. Tarnishing has not been an issue and the colors continue to look great. I have really enjoyed this set and the pieces where I have used these have met with great admiration.

Great set.

Like may others, I had seen the commercials for this product and thought I would give it a shot. It’s small, the logic is great - instead of pulling out the big sewing machine for little jobs use this little machine.

Well, that would be great if it worked. At first, with new batteries, I was able to sew a line of stitches through very thin felt like fabric. I thought this just might work. I had a pair of paints to hem - there was no chance the needle was going through both pieces of fabric - it turned into a bound up mess. I decided attempt something where it was flat, easier to maneuver - curtains. Yeah, same results.

This is nothing but a kids toy. Definitely not for any type of actual sewing that you want to count on.

Junk.

While I do not do a huge amount of sewing I do have the need to stitch on occasion. Prior to getting this I was always struggling to find everything I needed but this comes with all the critical tools needed for any simple stitching task.

I love that the scissors are not only very sharp but have large holes for your fingers allowing for smooth operation. The shears are super sharp allowing for thread to be cut at an angle for easy threading without the thread fraying. Thankfully the needles have generous sized eye holes making threading much easier than ones with tiny eye holes - and it comes with 2 threaders that I’ve used with the smaller needles. The seam ripper works exactly as it should.

This is an all around excellent set. I have used it about a dozen times since receiving it. Most sewing sets do not come with near this much - this set even has 41 LARGE spools of thread!

The nice fabric zippered case holds everything and definitely helps me in being able to find the accessories I need when I need them without having to search all over the house.

This is an outstanding sewing set that every household should have - and it makes a great gift!

I developed a process of sculpting leather during 1997 and when I saw this product I thought this could be an interesting addition to add to some of my sculptures.

Installation is easy and the set comes with the tools needed to place both sides of the snaps. There are a variety of colors and upon initial inspection I thought this would be a fun set to work with.

Unfortunately after installing these I quickly realized they simply will not remain snapped. The are constantly popping free making them useless.

While this had the potential of being a really cool set, due to consistent product failure it proved to be a waste of time.

Avoid this product.

I am a multimedia artist working in about every medium I can find. Stone, clay, wood, metal, leather, glass, wax, latex, paint, photography, electronics - I am always looking to push both my limits and the limits of the medium.

Metal leaf is a wonderful medium to have on hand when I want to add a contrast of color or texture to a piece. It takes a bit of practice learning to work with it but the end results are definitely worth the time.

As compared to sets you can find in your local art supply stores this is an incredible deal. The containers are HUGE. The colors are vibrant and the flake sizes are varied which I actually like.

In terms of application I use: Gold Size 8 Oz Quick Drying
by Hyatt's All Things Creative
( www.amazon.com/dp/B0028MRUV0/ref=cm_sw_em_r_mt_dp_98XYNQT09J4FMV5GPS3N ) most of the time. Depending on what I am applying the leaf to I have used everything from Mod Podge, acrylic medium, spray adhesive and watered down craft glue. The key is to apply and wait until tacky before laying the leaf.

Once finished covering with leaf definitely do a clear top coat which will not only protect the leaf but will keep it from lifting.

I have to say I love the copper in this set. It looks more like a rose gold to me which next to the gold creates a wonderful blended color.

My containers were not completely closed prior to shipping so some leaf ended up loose in the container - that is too bad and definitely should be rectified. In addition there were no tweezers included as indicated in the listing. While I was not depending on these I can imagine others may be and would be disappointed. Even with these flaws in the product it is an incredible deal as you would pay this much for 1/4 the leaf you receive at your local art supply store.

This is definitely a product I recommend.

Gouache paint is often referred to as a watercolor paint which it is simian too but is not the same as. A primary difference between the two paints is that gouache is more opaque than watercolor. Due to the transparency of watercolor, light is able to travel through the pigment and reflect off of the white paper, giving it a luminous quality that differs from gouache's matte finish. Gouache paint has significantly more pigment which makes it less transparent unless it is thinned. Many of the same techniques can be used with both types of paint although they do tend to behave a bit differently when painting.

Gouache paints are a great way to achieve solid colors as a base beneath the transparent hues of watercolors placed above them. The two media work beautifully together as they are so similar.

This is an outstanding set, this set of colors is perfect for creating a base of which you can add watercolors a top or to use alone. The pigments are dense, rich and vibrant. I love the consistency of these paints. They come in an excellent box and are well sealed which assures their quality until you are ready to use.

Whether this is your first foray into working with Gouache paints or it is your favorite medium, you will not be disappointed with this outstanding set.

These kits are cute but wow do they take a long time and a lot of patience to finish! Look for those of you writing bad reviews.. if you took tour time and made sure diamonds are put on "STRAIGHT", the pic would be 10x better. My pics are included.
I almost didnt buy any diamond art, until I saw a 2nd pic. I'm really glad I did because they are great.. I dont like how they fake the cover pictures with size and brilliance of photo. But very relaxing and fun art craft. I have fallen in love.

Things to watch out for.
(I have bought 3 different brands this 1 being first and 2nd arrived in mail today. So I can compare)
1. This brand watch for off sized Diamonds, there are more smaller one and very few larger 1s.

2. Some diamonds are dull and not quite right in color. I've noticed some of the blues are dull af to point it changes look of pic in some areas.

3. YOU MUST, make sure diamonds are straight and good rows. Take you time and place in center being picky about the diamond you use. Or cheat and buy an accessory kit with a straightener..

If u follow these steps you will get your money's worth outta this art project.
Awesome product!!! We had a blast doing this. Very bright colors and good dye.
I thought it was going to be a great product, the candle wax would come out the bottom, made a mess that was extremely hard to clean up.
Pattern has a lot of different options which is neat. On the pattern I received, the ink was faded and extremely hard to read in most places.
Item was exactly as described.
This clay does not work very well. This clay will not be cleaned. I tried EVERYTHING and I worked with other clays.
We love clay in our house. My daughter is constantly creating. She loved this set and used it all up within a few months. It hardens nicely in the oven and she now has piles of creations.
I received my shipment of these molds today and they had already been used I had to clean resin out of them the surfaces are scratched very very bad product.
I would not recommend these for coasters the sizes are way too different.
This has worked great in all of my projects.
I this was easy, the stones are very sparkly.
Great product, reasonable price and fun to use!
Item arrived on time and just as described.
This has everything you need for beginner or advanced clay crafting. Comes with accessories and tools as well as a ton of clay.
My granddaughter will love it
It was very good
These were a gift for a 13 year old.  She didn’t have any complaints.  She did love the way they were organized in the case
Making great stuff...
Love the ease of working with the clay.  Was soft right away.  Delivery was also quick.
Great product!

Some of the wooden pieces i received were chipped. No big deal because i purchased this for my daughter and she barely knew what to do with the tools anyways. The ones we did know what to do with worked as expected. A little bit bigger than i thought but had i read the description i wouldnt have been surprised. They are all now lost thanks to my toddler.

I think I might of got a bad batch. I've actually never seen clay do this but it won't soften and it just crumbles. I put a a block in the oven to see how it would do. It just falls apart when you touch it. I don't want to give this a bad review because it seems like a very nice kit that's put together but the box that I got is trash... and actually thats where a lot of the clay ended up since it was so unusuable. Unfortunately, I can't do a return for baked crumbled clay or id get a new kit to try out and see if it was just a mishap
My sister is using this for an unusual application. She is building a metal dragon.
No directions on how long or how to bake it
Came right on time. My son has been enjoying it since he received it
I loved how the product came with many tools to make different shapes, but I wish it was softer.

This is a good, moderately soft clay that is versatile and good for most clay crafting projects. It is fragile, even when baked to the exact directions on the package, but is also one of the easier clays for a beginner to work with. it is soft right out of the package and can be sanded, painted and drilled and holds up nicely over time for smaller pieces. This has become a main part of my tool kit as a clay artist.

This might work well for some fabrics, but I tried it on costume fabric and it was a total nightmare. It bled right through the material and wouldn't stick down without me holding it, even after minutes and minutes of holding it steady. I decided to try it with denim and although it didn't bleed through, it still took an age to adhere. Not the quick results I was hoping for by any means. Maybe I just got a bad bottle?  I don't know. I may try it again in the future and if I have better results I will update this review.

If you are looking for some basic paint brushes to work on crafts with, these will probably do nicely. Some of the bristles were a little uneven when I first got them, but after trimming them, they have worked out very nicely. They are well made and sturdy and there is a nice variety of styles and sizes. I would say these would be great for a beginning to intermediate crafter/painter. They work well for detailing and for covering slightly larger areas.

For the most part, this is okay, but I did notice that it takes a bit longer to dry than other similar products, such as sax tru flow or sculpey. It also has a rather strong smell, so I would suggest working in an open space whilst using it or at the very least, leaving a window or door open. When it is dry, it looks comparable to other products and does a good job of sealing and protecting. You get quite a bit for the price you pay as well. Overall, it isn't bad, just a little different than what I was used to.

I thought this mohair was decent quality, but has a lot of flecks of dirt and who knows what--little sticks and things in it and isn't very evenly dyed. There are bits that are very brassy red and bits that are blonde. It works for the simple projects I am doing, making polymer clay babies, but for larger dolls with bigger quantities of hair, it might be harder to work with.

I was looking for a larger, basic sketchbook when I found this one. I've been really happy with it so far. The paper is heavy and handles my chosen art supplies well. I use graphic markers and pens a lot and this does great with them. The paper is good quality and smooth and gets on fine with pencils without smearing or smudging too much. The pages tear out easily enough without a struggle. The book is a little bit bend, not having a very thick back to it, but it isn't bad. Overall, this a is a great sketchbook for the price.

Great for the price you pay. These are just what i was looking for to make some paper crafts with the kids. The plastic is durable and I liked the various sizes. Shipped quickly and well packaged. No complaints.

Rarely do I find a paper stack where I can find a solid use for each and every design in the booklet, but in this one, I did. This is an absolutely stunning selection of prints with a good variety of colour. This works well with rubber stamps and for bordering in scrapbooks. I would certainly recommend this for anyone looking for a good value and a product that is what the description claims it to be. Good!

This is good quality paper that works very well with watercolours, markers and a variety of other mediums. The texture is smooth and the paper is very white so it works well for most applications. I do wish that this paper had micro-perforation as some of them do, so the paper would more cleanly tear from the book, but otherwise, I am pretty happy with it. The price was pretty good for this here on Amazon as compared to local craft stores.

This tape runner is by far the best one that I have used. The tape easily sticks to the surface you are applying it to, doesn't gum up and make a mess of the surface or the tape runner itself and is pretty well permanent once you stick your intended item to it. It is easy to peel off any unwanted residue around the item as well, so it makes for a clean and not messy glue option. I have been thrilled with the result of this product and am looking forward to continued use in a variety of applications.

These are definitely better than I expected for the price they are offered at. The ink laydown is smooth and there isn't a lot of bleed. The dual tips are well made and resistant to damage. The colours are nice and pretty close to the cap color represented, but there is no green in this set, which I found kind of odd. There seems to be plenty of ink, I have used them for a number of weeks and haven't had one dry out or run out of ink yet. Overall these are good for adult colouring books and other craft projects and were a great deal for the small price tag.

This kit is a good value but my 9 year old was playing with it and said she poked herself with something sharp inside the white clay block. It looked like some kind of small shard of metal and it was actually quite sharp - a younger child might have easily cut themselves.
My kids love it. Non smelly or discoloration.easy to work with
This was a great gift! Easy, fun and brings out the creative side of those days when you are stuck indoors!! Fun for all ages

The clay is not craft grade quality and neither are the tools included. This kit is SMALL, I ended up giving it to my 6 yr old niece. I was hoping to get a beginners set so I could attempt some polymer clay crafts but the size of the clay is ridiculously small for the price tag. Again, would be a great toy for a child but they should not be marketing this as a craft supply.
I wanted to use these as necklace cords for my more feminine pieces but they feel scratchy. Well made and lovely pattern. Nice for trim on something.

This is a really good value. The adhesion is unreal. I could hardly clean it off my tile. Looks shiny and gorgeous. Why buy the real gold when this looks just as good. Unless you plan to put it on something edible. Then you need to get that specific kind. Don't eat this. Seriously, I wouldn't.

I go through a lot of these guys. They add a nice touch to necklaces and bracelets. Hole is plenty big enough for most cords. Just get them. Seriously. If you are shopping around for spacers and looking for quality, value and usefulness, just get these.

If you are like me, and your eyes and hands are not quite what they used to be, these are great. They are a nice size and easy to hold and secure onto a jump ring. They seem quite sturdy as well. One broke but I won't hold that against a machined product. I have worked in factories, I understand that QA can't be 100%.

This clay is fine for kids to play with. Don't expect that hard plastic result that comes from better brands like Sculpey. This clay is still very breakable and even crumbly after baking. Color transfer onto hands and work surface is pretty bad too.
Good buy. Product cheap but didn't come with all the tools it was supposed to.
Me encanto facil de manejar, escasamente lo que andaba buscando,todo lo que necesitaba esta inclyiso, definitivamente lo volvería a comprar😄😄😄😄😄❤❤
Purchased for my niece to use with her polymer clay jewelry.  She is 8 and they were perfect for her!

Bought as a gift
Very nice set

Great value.
Much cheaper than the craft store
Nice storage kit also
My daughter has been sculpting with clay for years. This is such a good value! Tons of colors.
I bought this for my grandson, he loves it
Heavy paper that absorbs the paint beautifully. It tears out from the top easily without ripping. This is as good or better than any watercolor paper I’ve used. Very happy with it

I got this for my kiddos to paint rocks and figurines. It’s a great overall, basic set. It came with 3 brushes (you’ll want more) and 24 different colors of paint. The paint is highly saturated. Its not runny, but not gloppy. They can use directly from the bottle or squirt onto a pallette.

My son uses these to paint his D&D figures with acrylics and war hammer paints. He can really focus on the smallest details with precision because of how fine the tips are with these brushes. He cleans them up immediately, has never complained of shedding, he stores them in the tube they came in. High quality item!!
These are priced about the same as most sets and work equally as well. The white is clean and bright and the designs all look sharp. The lid slips firmly into the cup so-no drips!

I use chalk markers every week. They eventually run out of liquid inside and need to be replaced. This set has more colors than my previous set and I’m super happy about that. They are easy to grip and relatively easy to “activate”. (You need to press the tip down to make the chalk liquid flow, then give the market a good shake) the caps indicate what color the marker is. The box is sturdy and stores all the marker while not in use.

My 12 yo wanted this for his art kit. He charged it, set it up, filled it, and used it without any help from me. He said it was super simple and sprayed evenly, without clogging. Everything comes apart to clean (I did help with that!) and I stored it in the box it’s shipped in since everything fits into the size-appropriate slots. He’s already had a lot of fun with this and I expect many more hours of creativity.
holds up well and my resin dried nicely without any weird spots or anything. Kind of sicky though and attracted dirt and hair, had to clean before each use.

First thing is, this is super cute. Secondly, it actually works. Third, it’s easy! Obviously this isn’t for big jobs but it’s nice to have a small unit that stores compactly that you can use from time to time for smaller items. Comfortable to use too and doesn’t slip out of your hand.

I’ve used this twice now at a face painting booth. Good variety of colors and the consistency is appropriate for skin. High pigmentation and smooth. Will smear if rubbed but washes off easily and completely. 12 colors and comes with brushes. Also the acrylic case closes completely when not in use.

Nice gadget! Sure beats using a bowl without a handle! This has a flat bottom so you can set it in counter when not using. The long handle stays cool to the touch when using. The included spatula is a nice touch and just the right size for the depth of the bowl. It cleans up to a like-new condition every time. Holds about 3/4 of a bag of chocolate chips.

The kids have had so much fun with this kit. It was smaller than I thought it would be but SO PACKED with different colors and carving tools!! It’s soft until you cook it. Then, after it’s cooked, it’s sturdy and lasts. They’ve created figures beyond my imagination. Perfect gift for children for COVID Christmas!

I used these for Xmas tags. I used at least 6 inches of the included red and white twine for each disc and still has a little left over. 3 of the discs were cracked or the bark had peel off, making them less than desirable to use. Overall I’m happy with these. If I need more, there’s a good chance I’ll reorder this brand.

These are beautiful dried flowers. I used some in candles and others in resin jewelry. Everytime, they hold their shape and the color stays true. They don’t fold over either. The sheets are carefully wrapped. There is a plastic sheet over the top of flowers.

Great pens. I love the box they ship and store in. It's super sturdy and holds the pens upright so all the labels are visible. The pens are slightly chunky and easy to hold. Not smelly either. I gave 4 stars because several pens are labeled the same color, but a different number. Blue Gray has 3 pens dedicated to it, for example. There are some types in the set too. Porest Green instead of Forest Green was 1 we found. Still, a really nice set and provide lots of variety. They're made in China.

This kit has everything. It comes in a sturdy plastic tote and has wicks, molds, scents, flair, dye, wax, thermometer and melting pitcher. I was suprised at how full and round the scents were. The wicks all stayed on thru application. The colors look really pure. Happy with this!

ARE YOU KIDDING ME WITH HOW CUTE THESE ARE?? I adore each little flower and bow! Some have a felt circle on back that reinforces burlap. I made barrettes from them, layering bows and flowers. They are darling and look legitimately country-cute.

16oz of resin and 16oz of hardener for all your fun resin crafts. We've been making earrings. They have all come out very hard. This resin allows for nice color saturation too. Nice to have a generous amount to play with!

My 12 year old is obsessed with flip books. This set is better than most because of the fasteners it's shipped with. They hold the book together really tight. And you can make your book as thin or thick as you'd like. The paper is thick enough that ink doesn't bleed thru  and the paper itself is bright.

My daughter wanted these for her art projects but I kept a couple for myself. She is better at art than I am, I tried to do some striping but I don't have her steady hand. I found these quite good for labeling some things around the shop & even decorated my hose reel with the gold marker.
The tips are the finest I have ever used for paint markers. The paint does not have any appreciable smell. The caps hold tight and the body is durable enough that I keep one in my backpack for work trips for labeling things that need something more durable & vibrant than a Sharpie type marker can provide.
This was so much fun, my daughters loved this kit! The clay is easy to mold and very soft... Only had an issue with one colour being crumbly and unusable (brown).
So cute. Very great product for value
Excellent mix of small to medium large rings Good for any project. The color works well and the finish is sort of burnished so attention is on the jewelry not what holds it together.

I'm just a beginner, and this wire is very easy to work with. Not too stiff so easy to work with. Shiny, but not mirror shiny, and it is not silver, but looks like silver. No need for a polishing or polishing cloth.
don't know about durability because it's plastic, and it sits on the nose so there may be a lot of wear on the nose gripper. It fits perfectly and comfortably.

I think these will hold up very well under proper usage. Colors are great, but not sure of the stability of color under constant wear. Very nice look, fashionable chain for braceles or necklaces. Looking forward to all the compliments!

Now my thread is all sorted which will save me from purchasing thread colors I already have. a bunch of pieces to put together, but it's great it hangs on the wall so it doesn't take up work table space. I think it will hold up pretty well.

Handy for short needles, but when using a long needle, the compartments area little small to pick up beads. So this is really useful when making 1, 2, 3, etc. strands necklaces or bracelets. Not so useful when making beaded beads. although you can line up your beads in the grooves when making beaded beads and that makes it very easy to pick up beads one at a time. I do recommend using this tool when beginning beading. It helps in organizing your creation and eliminates most mistakes.
Just a fabulous magnifier. Built in grid to help you measure, 10x mag brings even the tiniest speck into focus. I can easily see flaws in my coins and/or jewelry. Great valu.

These beads are very nice, however one thing to remember these are glass not crystals so the don't sparkle in low light. They do in high light. The colors are very nice and should blend with most other colors except the aqua color is definitely more green than blue.
The colors are wonderful, easy to use, and very thin. You can't make clasps with this size.

These paint brushes are wonderful. The points on each brush are perfect for painting miniatures 9wich is what I'm working on now). Tiny detail? No problem. Long bristles, short bristles, fine lines or thick lines no problem. A brush for every tight corner. Love them.
Came today. Absolutely beautiful! The print is a little bit small, but for younger eyes it is just fine. Love them! Will buy more!!

I got this because of the different shades of green. The clay is super easy to mold… maybe a little too easy. But the clay is super pigmented and upon opening two of them an oily ink substance was leaked all over my hand.
There are fewer than 20 pieces and do not match the description- DON'T waste your money on this scam.
Uniform holes and bead sizes
Great quality! Next time I will buy thicker paper though...too thin for product tags.
to create his lighthouse vision. He did a good job!
Bought as a gift for my artistic niece.  She loves it and has been making all kinds of clay figures. Nice set for the $
These are good. I was able to transfer my vinyl. They have okay sticking power. I had to put a little more pressure than usual for some of my projects
Used these in the oven for making lil figures, held up amazing and well detailed!
I’ve made so many cute keychains with this set!!! For my first clay set, this is amazing!
Bad!!! One month for send me!😡
My son (who hates art lol) can play for hours with this stuff!
Big, strong, safety pins. Happy with them!
Set of Acrylic paints. Good quality.
Paintbrushes. Work well.
I always like the Apple Barrel paints. I bought this one so my husband can do a repair on a glass lamp. Price was not great, though.
It's fine. I use it for making journals.

My daughter got a new laptop for school and of course, she needed to deck it out in stickers. This is great because you get a ton for the price, however I have to admit you get a lot of repeats. Many sheets of stickers, but its not 640 UNIQUE stickers. But at the asking price, it's great to have and with so many stickers you can decorate multiple items (notebooks, lockers, etc) with similar ones.

My kids absolutely love this. Not only is it easy to learn and understand how a pottery wheel works, it comes with informative literature that helps young minds grasp the history and culture around it. The whole kit is presented in a polished and high quality way that only a brand like National Geographic could bring to life. My daughter has been making different projects out of it and has told us all kinds of interesting facts about it. I highly recommend it as a gift or just something to do with your kids on a rainy weekend.

I got this for our home after our old sewing kit lost most of the supplies. This is a MUCH better kit than our old standard one! It is much larger, has more items and pretty much includes anything we might ever need to repair/fix/adapt/etc any kind of household sewing job. My wife loves it, it seems high quality for the price. I would absolutely recommend it.

My daughter enjoys arts and crafts projects, so I figured she'd like this set too. It is a cute project, it comes with all the things you need to make a three dimensional picture frame scene out of rocks. You can follow the directions or veer off to go your own way. There's no wrong way to do this, really. The rocks aren't real, but I guess that just makes the kit easier to work with.
Definitely something fun and creative to do on a rainy afternoon or if stuck at home during quarantine.

We're always looking for fun indoor activities for rainy weekends or cold winter days, and this is a great one! Unlike slime, you actually get to make something useful and the kids have a blast doing it! Highly recommended for creative kids that want a fun project.

Being able to draw on porcelain and glass opens up some really fun projects. We have an old set of dishes that no longer has enough place settings, and rather than throw away the remaining ones, we turned them into decorative plates with these markers. We broke into teams, each expressing their own unique style, and it became a really cool activity when we were all together for the holidays. It seems to have worked well, once the ink dried it doesn't look like it will come off easily. I'm not entirely sure if it is food safe, so the plates are just for decoration, but what a cool project. I recommend it.

Hook and loop is the generic term for Velcro, in case there was any confusion here. This hook and loop system seems to be about as strong as I'd expect from the Velcro brand name, so that's good. My kids like to hang things on the wall, and my wife works in a school so this is a concept we are familiar with. I love that my kids can leave little dots on the walls and change what picture or "artwork" is hanging next to their bed as often as they want. And I've personally found them pretty useful for things like sticking the remote to the side of our entertainment system shelf.
With 400 of them, you should be good for a long time!
Daughter loved this tool and clay kit and iy had a great color variety,  for the price it was a good deal!
My daughter was really happy when she received this kit. She likes being able to pick up 5 diamonds at a time. Everything in here came in handy for her. It was all neatly packaged and arrived fast.
These eyes are so pretty, my daughter loves these eyes they are working so perfect with her polymer clay. There is so many different sets of beautiful eyes thank you for such a great order.
Perfect and good quality. Great value. If you drawl you definitely need this set
I bought it for my granddaughters.... She just love love loved it!
Too many shades of pink..
Useless, it won't give you shiny finish and it left scratches on the surface.
Good product but the lid of most of the bottles cannot be removed easily or entirely by one attempt.
The colors of the clay are awesome, but the quality isn’t great. I found the texture very hard/crumbly and harder to use compared to brands like Sculpey
Awesome designs, high quality printing and stickers. Perfect for the 1940-1950 era lovers! Will definitely order again!

Prior to watching this stamp set being demo'd on Tim Holtz Facebook Live, I probably would've scrolled right by this set without giving it a second glance. Now I see limitless possibilities and have used it dozens of times already. The quality of the rubber is second to none and the details are amazing.

I didn't even know this tool existed until Tim Holtz used it in one of his Facebook Live tutorials. I ruined so many projects by using inferior products. The quality of this product is fantastic and will last a lifetime.
So awesome. My sons loves it.
I made my grandson a cute turtle and then baked it in the oven. Everything worked like it should. Clay was super easy to use.
Grandkids loved the kit.
Got it for my daughter for Christmas she loves it. Easy instructions for an 8 year old to follow.
Making small crocheted animals & dolls. These eyes are perfect!
This clay is in my opinion a great product. Its soft, pliable and a good price.
Product okay but should not be used around sensitive people or pets.
There was black mold inside the box and instruction manual.

Great starter kit that includes all you need to get started plus tons of paper! Also has some patterns to get you started, only bad thing is instructions in Chinese but you can fugure it out by the pictures.
Perfect for our needs. We’re just starting our own in-house screen printing company and this tool makes all of our prints centered and even.
Just what we needed for a craft at our homeschool co-op class.  These are standard pipe cleaners in a variety of bright, and lovely colors.  Not too thick or too thin, just perfect for basic crafts.
Four children ages 9,7,5,3!  These are the ones I saved.  Kept them busy for hours.  Colors stay bright after baking. Loved the jewelry. Strong!
Really love this

Loved the perfect fit for my husband’s dress shirt.
Grandson’s wedding soon ♥️
Love the filled bobbins. Makes it easier while sewing.  No need to take time filling them
Colors and designs are as described. I just find it a bit too sticky and not like ordinary washi tape.
Strawberries everywhere! I'm so happy with these!
This is the best watercolor paper I've ever owned!
These are different from my other brush pens and I am still getting the hang of them. I love the design - it's creative and sophisticated. I'm a satisfied customer.
A great selection. I should have gel pens to last me a very long time. So far they all work very well. They do not bleed on to the other pages and none of them have dried up.
This was a gift and the recipient loved it!
These are perfect and they write beautifully.
So pretty!! It matched so good with the Rose Gold and Pink wrapping paper I paired it with.  Very easy to use and makes great bows.
Very good value. They are smooth and allow for a nu e buildable watercolor.
Very very tiny.
Mold had bubbles all over it and is extremely small.

This 5D diamond crafting set is awesome. I love it as it has all of the horror favorites. My teenager wanted this as he loves arts and crafts. It comes with all of the tools you need too. Great set for the price!

These painting canvases are extremely nice for the price. You get 28 total and 4 different sizes: 5x7, 8x10, 9x12 and 11x14. Each canvas comes individually wrapped. My kids love using these for painting and they work perfectly.
These little clams with pearl charms are so pretty! They sparkly very nicely and are perfect for arts and crafts. You get 30 in the set and there are a good variety of colors.
This Art & Precision Craft Glue works great. I love how it comes with the metal tip so that you can be more precise and it holds well. It also dries clear, so that is a plus.

My kids love making clay art so I ordered this clay for them. You must follow the exact instructions to use this clay. You have to mix equal amounts of part A and part B. Also you cannot save any extra amounts, so only make the amount that you need. If you try to save it in a container or a bag, it will harden up after a few hours and not be usable. This is exactly what happened to us.

Mixing it is very messy and it does stain - Make sure to wear gloves.

For the small amount of 4 clays, it is not worth the high price. You can get a larger amount for less than half the price if you shop around. Maybe if this clay was cheaper, I would rate the product differently. But for us it was no bueno.

This clay is different than other sculpting clays that we have tried. You need to follow the specific instructions and mix part A with part B and then use it right there or there. You cannot save any extra amounts after mixing (even if put in a container or a ziploc bag). We tried to save our extra amounts and they hardened up after a few hours. With this set of clay, you only get 4 small containers. It is not much for the price at all. You can find other types of sculpting clay where you get more for your money if you shop around.

These silicone feet do have the look of real human’s feet. However, I feel that the stock photos are painted more realistically than the actual item that I received. The silicone is soft and squishy - nice quality.

These can be used to display shoes or ankle jewelry. Also, can be used as a Halloween prop (my plan)!

One thing I found a bit odd is that there was a hole at the top. I am assuming that this is so you can attach to a mannequin for display. The nails are plastic, but everything else is silicone.

Update to review: This is actually a Vajankle. I never knew what it was until I looked it up. That is why the top of the foot looks like a vagina. I plan to use for Halloween display, hopefully no one notices.

These silicone child’s feet are extremely detailed and very realistic looking. You would think they are actual child’s feet! Perfect for shoe modeling or even great for a Halloween display. Love them!

This cordless airbrush is very easy to use and has well written instructions on how to use. You can use for airbrush art on t-shirts, nails, and even cakes! It works with watercolor pigments, food coloring, inks and dyes, as well as appropriately diluted paint and acrylic paints. There are really so many uses for this little gadget!! Love it!

This 48 watercolor set is nice and perfect for art class! I love how compact the case is, so it is portable and you can literally take it anywhere you go. It comes in a storage bag with 1 watercolor brush. Very nice quality set overall!

This 2 pack of sketch pads by Norberg and Linden are very nice quality! Each pad contains 100, 9x12 sheets, and the sheets are thicker and more durable than regular paper. It’s great for colored pencils, markers, pastels, and crayons. My son loves these for his art class. 😊
These silicone resin molds are so easy to use and are great for coasters! We had so much fun with this project. Overall, excellent quality, and love that I can use them again.

This flower, glitter, and foil set is a great starter set if you want to do epoxy resin art. There are so many different colors of glitter and flowers, and the foil pieces are super shiny. It’s truly a beautiful set!
These little eyes work perfectly for clay sculptures! They stick well and do not fall off. You also get a lot in the container, so they will last a long time. Great for arts & crafts!

My son loves art and drawing. He absolutely loves this set! It comes with so much and it’s an amazing price for all that you get with it! It comes with 12 Graphite Pencils, 3 Charcoal Pencils, 12 Watercolor Pencils, and 12 Metallic Colored Pencils. You also get a sketch pad with it. The pencils are really nice quality and it’s packaged so nicely.

[[VIDEOID:adcbbad8de073979bed7c4dbc8b9104d]] This train set absolutely goes above and beyond. Everything on it is so realistic, from the sounds (conductor, horn, and bells), to the light on the front of the train, to the actual real smoke that comes out of it! Everything about it is a true masterpiece and so very well detailed! The remote is very easy to operate, requires 3 AAA batteries (not included) and allows you to control the speed and sounds of the train. Once done, you just turn off the remote and unplug from the outlet. My only complaint about this is that putting the track together was quite difficult. You need to have a lot of muscle, and your hands may be a little sore after assembling as mine were. Once put together though, it is truly amazing! See my short video about this train for more!
It was fun to experiment with Polymer clay after reading much about it. It didn't quite become the obsession I hoped for, but this clay was generally pretty good to work with.
As good as some of the reviews suggested. I'm very happy with my purchase.
Memory sex

It only does 1-3 pages at a time but that's sufficient for my planner and it beats the heck out of the 7-hole-punches that won't accept the right settings for a 6-ring planner.
If you want something sturdier you can spend $50 on the Filofax personal planner 6-hole punch, but this one is quite workable and does the job.
Even came with 3 brushes

Got this fabulous coloring book for Christmas from my boyfriend that took it from my Wish List from Amazon. Totally love this coloring book due to the the thick paper and beautiful drawings that you can color with colored pencils or markers. They provide a thick piece of paper to put under the one sided picture just in "case" the markers go through. But the quality of the paper is absolutely perfect. Glad to have this coloring books as one of my favorites.
I am creating a specific creative project in which I will use over 2000 patches. Every month I buy a new set of different patches... these are manufactured well, with a great variety... very cool!

Yes, I'm addicted to bullet Journaling! I just got these pens. The price was so reasonable compared to other pens! And there is an excellent assortment! Oh, and I'm a sucker for a freebie... these came with 4 templates, and they were ones I didnt have before! I recommend these pens... fo show!

The Snowy Owl is one of my spirit animals. Owl never let's me down when it comes to good advice, so I wanted to honor him by purchasing something that resembled him.
I dont know what I'm going to put it on yet, will probably buy a jacket just for patches!
I was very pleased at the length of the ribbon on the spools. Im a crafter, none of this will go to waste. A bargain for 10 spools in different colors.
These beads are so worth the price! So many sizes, so mu h you can do with them... make a little doll head or string them for jewelry. Paint them with designs or just one color... they are great!

I wanted to reward my child with some sort of badge of honor when she did the right thing without me telling her to do something. When i was in the Military, coins were given as momentos. So i made her a collection of coins out of these AxeSickles. She loves them. We have a ceremony when she receives one, and then she puts them in a special box. I am making smaller ones next that she can save when she does her chores, and trade in for prizes. Who knows, maybe she will give them to her own child some day. I hope so....
Nice wooden box to store my printmaking tools for art class. I will be decorating with either acrylic paints and/or a collage effect.
This is a good product to hang my various drop necklaces on. Other than that there’s not a lot to say.
A head's up here - I ordered 1 Darice Calligraphy stencil.  I like it ok, but  I received 3 instead of 1!!??
Good product!
This is probably the best price you can get for a good sturdy wood H-shape easel, with wheels as well for better moving. The wood is heavy, very good built. HobbyLobby sells this for over $150.

It’s real hard to find a long bolster in America. and so I figured I will have to make one myself, and I absolutely have zero knowledge for sewing. I took a lot of time to find a good machine for my very beginner skill. This is the perfect choice. All the instruction can be scary to look at first but keep follow it and everything works just fine. I have successfully made my own bolster, pillow covers, and a simle pillow dog bed!
Love all the charms received! Such a variety to choose from

This is not what I hoped for. The button maker that is supposedly die cast metal is cracked ALL THE WAY THROUGH! Not only is it cracked and looking like it'll break after a bit of use, but the base the press sits on is PARTICLE BOARD and not the glossy, seemingly plastic or resin base shown in the pictures. I'm too worried that is I try to use it, it will break and make it harder to return. I'm sending it back and going with another seller. :(
I love this elastic! Very soft against your skin, very luxurious.
Does what it is supposed to do, have used it on thin fabric, too.
Simple tool to measure sewing projects BUT it is THEE most useful little ruler. I am also using it to trace my necklines to cut and top stitch them perfectly.

UPDATE 2 YEARS LATER: since I have made nearly 30 items of clothing for myself in these last two years, I have thought about upgrading to a bigger, better sewing machine. BUT, I decided against it. The other day, I was sewing a new dress with a piece of expensive Liberty of London fabric and I could FEEL that my bobbin ran out of thread. It was a slight change I could not have felt even a year ago. My point is, is that this machine is a part of me. I know when something doesn't feel right, I know how to use all the parts and what they should behave like. This is a very good machine and I am not willing to part with it yet.

JULY 2014: Everyone told me how difficult sewing would be: threading the machine, sewing straight lines, sewing over my finger. I must admit that I was intimidated to buy and attempt sewing but this machine is great! Yes, many of the parts are plastic- but I was unwilling to spend more than the $160 this machine was listed for. I have some curtains to make, so I practiced sewing on my existing curtains- I have so much confidence, thanks to the ease of this machine. There is a complete manual but I used the fold-out quick guide to teach me how to thread a bobbin and then the machine- easy instructions, simple machine to thread. There are three speeds, it was set to the slowest setting, that allowed me to build my confidence, now I am sewing on the fastest setting. I haven't had any issues, as of yet- I've hemmed eight panels so far; I've been on the machine all week- also practicing sewing straight lines onto tea towels.
IF this machine proves to break easily because of the plastic parts, I've had such a good experience, I know that I would but a more expensive machine.

I picked these up to decorate a teddy bear statue (for my daughter's bedroom) and it turned out cuter than I expected. The little square mirrors were easy to apply. Up close they're not the nicest quality though. The mirror finish bubbled up a lot on many of the squares. But from a few feet away, it's hard to see. I would recommend them for a fun project! It's unique, that's for sure.

We have a house full of budding artists, and we love sculpting with air dry clay. This set was an excellent choice for a refill, since white and black are the colors we blow through the quickest. You also get a lot of clay, so its a great choice if you need a base. It is easy to work with and doesn't stain their hands/clothes. We would recommend this brand, for sure!

I ordered this clay because we have multiple artists in our house and they were thrilled that I did. This kit was a lot bigger than I expected. Plus you get so many colors in this set!
Our girls pull it out every other day and have put quite a dent in most of the colors. Their only complaint is they used up all of the black and white right away. Other than that, there is plenty of other colors and they have done an endless number of projects. I like that the clay isn't too sticky or messy either. Plus the colors do not bleed or stain their hands. Highly recommend!

This set is awesome. There are so many colors, it's almost overwhelming and hard to choose, lol.
A long time ago, I considered myself an artist before my kids came a long. Now I art for fun and lately I've been painting 3D pieces for a board game my husband is printing off. And his HUGE paint set has made the job so much easier. Because of all the color options, I no longer have to waste time mixing and matching the perfect shades anymore.
Plus the paint is thick and feels like nice quality. The colors are bright and pigmented too. I have nothing but good luck so far and I couldn't think of one bad thing to write. The artist in me would have absolutely loved to receive this is a gift. It would the perfect set for hobby artists and student artists a like. Highly recommended!!!

These markers are ok, and I think would be good for journaling or list making; but not a lot else. My markers were not overly juicy. Some of the tips are already dry and I have to trace over my letters.
Also, I felt like the color choices do not match the theme of the set. The colored ink is brighter in person than they appear on the box. The colors are still pretty though... just not as muted as I expected. Either way, I liked this set for notetaking. But I didn't love it.
I don't think I can recommend this set because I wouldn't buy it again. Arteza can be "hit or miss" and I'm sorry to say I don't think this set is worth the $30 price tag.

Years before I had kids, I considered myself an artist. I think this sketchbook would work just fine for most people. The pages are thick and decent quality. The cover is durable, so that is better for travel. And you get a lot of pages too.
What I didn't like about it is there were random dots on quite a few of the pages that were blended into the paper. As a perfectionist, this would have driven me nuts had I needed that part of the paper white. But these are still great books for my kids. I'd buy them again, for sure.

This is a great assortment of Mario stickers. My son loves every one of them, and is having a great time sticking them to all of the other Mario things we have in the house.
The size of these is also great, they are about 2". Some of these assortments, the stickers are all HUGE and they are hard to put on smaller items. These are just right!

I've been using these pens for a full month now and I couldn't be happier with them. A few months back, I started journaling and it has become my new obsession. And these fine line markers have been a fantastic addition!
They're juicy as can be still after many uses. The colors are bright and very pigmented. Plus the nub tips are still firm; even after using them often with stencils. I can't think of a negative thing to say about these. This set was an excellent find. So if you find the price right, I would definitely have to recommend you consider these!

This is a really nice set of markers... it truly is! I ordered this set for journaling, but my teenage son ended up stealing them from me! I catch him drawing with them every day.
These markers are juicy and overlap pretty easily. Plus the colors are bright, very pigmented, and are true to life.
They seem well made too. The felt tips have held up great; even after a month's worth of use from a not-so-gentle teen. Overall, I think there set is a really good value. We're impressed so we'd have to recommend them!
Hope this review was helpful.

I think this is a nice set of drawing pads. The paper quality is good and consistent throughout the book. It is an excellent pad for a lots of quick sketches. Plus you got a ton of drawing pages.
I think this one would travel well in a backpack, so it would be an excellent pad for a wide variety of student artists. The only thing I didn't love about it is the spiral binding edges are sharp. At the very top and the bottom of the spiral that is. I ended up coating mine in a clear fingernail polish, and the problem was solved. But if you don't do anything to remedy this, you might end up with a few snagged articles of clothing.
But overall, it's a nice drawing pad and I'm happy I came across it! For reference, I considered myself an "real" artist way back before becoming a stay at home mom. I ordered this set of drawing pads for my 12-year-old and he was beyond thrilled.

I think this mat is excellent and one of my favorite new things. I've been using it for over a month now for a variety of craft projects here at home and it has held up beautifully. Plus the mat still looks brand new! It is sturdy, durable and feels like it is made out of excellent quality materials.
I also love that it has measurements printed right there for an easy reference. It has saved me a ton of time and makes it really easy to remember what sized items I am working with. Plus I also like using this mat to photographed my finished projects, so I know exactly how big they ended up being. I can't think of one bad thing to write about this mat. It's absolutely prefect and has been a lot more useful than I expected.

Personally, I found this set to be simply adequate, but not overly impressive. The markers are not overly juicy. And after a month of use, some have started to dry up. I don't even use them every day either! I might only use them a couple of times a week for a few moments here and there.... for things like making a list or occasional journaling entry.
Also, I felt like the color choices were off. There is a lot of warm yellow/brown colors in this set, but not a lot of cool colors. Pus I don't think there isn't true red in this set; and it lacking in red/purples. Either way, I liked this set but I didn't love it. I don't think I can recommend these markers because I wouldn't buy it again. Like most things Arteza puts out, their products can be very "hit or miss". I'm sorry to say this set isn't worth the $36 price tag, imo.

I love that you get a ton in the set. Before I found these, I only had a couple of extenders. Let me tell you having 10 is far better than having to two! They're easy to use and I'm very happy to have found them. I wish I would have picked up a set of 10, years ago. I really do.

This is the sixth drawing pad I've ordered in this last year. The first one I had was cool; but only lasted a couple months before the charging port became too loose to hold the cord. Light up pads #2 - 5 had a variety of problems. But loose port charging problems were a constant theme among all of them. I was so frustrated.... Until this board was delivered!
From the moment I pull it out of the box, I knew this "light box" was far better made. The overall design is different than the other flat plexi-glass like ones. The charging port on this pad is not a part of the clear, light up screen; but rather it is securely built into a base below the screen. It makes the port incredibly sturdy.
But I'm just as impressed with how good this board works. I think this board would be great choice for those with light sensitivity or for anyone who works in lower lighting conditions. The other boards I had were often too bright, even on the lowest setting. Blindingly bright even, to the point where I couldn't use them at night. This board is perfectly usable anytime of day. All 5 brightness settings are useful; but the lowest is really nice to have.
Also, the brightness buttons are raised, so they're easy to find. Oh and the magnets are a cute touch. I have found them to be quite helpful, much to my surprise. None of the previous boards had magnets or raised light buttons.
Overall I'm really happy with this one. I took be a long time to find light board that ready works, so I am saving this link. This one not only works but has features I didn't know existed. I am really happy with it. Of course, I would come back to buy it again; so I have to recommend it. I had so much trouble on this journey that I don't want to waste your time or money either. I'll be back with updates if this board suddenly starts failing me. But for now, I'm really excited by this find and am happy to own it.

In an effort to reduce screen time, I've insisted my kids start doing art projects. My 13yo daughter wanted to try diamond painting and she is absolutely loving it. I chose this set in particular because it came with six fun different characters that still appeal to a girl her age. And it did not disappoint. She absolutely was thrilled by all six.
This set comes with everything she needed too. The materials are nice quality and the gems are sparkly bright. I am happy to say she has stuck with them and has already finished one the little mermaid one. It turned out great and she was very proud. The canvas looks like it will be easy to frame too if she wants too. The only thing I didn't love about these were they all come a little wrinkly from being rolled up. But after laying them out for a few days under heavy books, it was enough and the canvases have stayed flat. Definitely consider this set. You get a lot of bang for your buck.
Hope this review was helpful.

The board is nice and works as described. But I'm not the biggest fan and I think for a little more money you could do a lot better. When I turn it on, it comes on at full brightness. It's blinding bright. And this board must be connected by a cord to work. USBs are notoriously weak in structure, which is why we're seeing them less and less often. If it had a sturdier port to charge this, I may not be as upset. My husband works in Information Technology (IT), so we know how to be very careful with our electronics. And I can still promise an USB port will not last us long. Maybe a year or two best before it start getting loose.
Hope this review was helpful.

This is a nice pair of scissor holders. The leather is very thick and durable, so they'll be excellent for a sharp set. Just make sure to measure your scissors, lol. Half the ones I expected to fit, didn't because they were bigger than I remembered them being once I pulled them out of the drawer.
Hope this review was helpful.

I cannot recommend this product, as it would not turn on or take a charge. We used the charger provided, as well as several others we had around the house. Could not get it to power on. My husband works in the IT (information technology) field, And he could not get this to work.

These are absolutely fantastic for craft projects!!! My kids (aging from preschoolers to preteens) have all had a wonderful time creating art on these. They like to give them as presents to their teachers and their grandparents. It's too cute.
We found these boards are well made. The canvas is stretched tight and they do not warp when exposes to lots of water. I would have recommend trying them, for sure!!!

I picked this up for my 8 year old because she is a mini artist, who loves making people gifts. Miniature sculptures are among our favorite things to make, so this clay has been been one of her favorite presents so far this year. The clay is bright and colorful, and she has more than enough colors to choose from. It's soft and easy enough to work with as well. And I haven't notice it staining any clothing. We both have nothing but good things to say about this product! I would highly recommend it!!!

I like these brushes a lot and truly would consider them a great option for student and hobby artists! I was a professional artist years ago and have owned hundreds of brushes over the years. I stopped painting daily once I became a stay-at-home mom and now I only paint for fun. So for many reasons, I prefer working with hobby brushes like these over my artist grade brushes (the number one reason bring those cost $20 to $50 a piece!)
But these are really nice brushes. The bristles in this set are soft and flexible; so they pick up a good amount of product. And lay down an even amount of product but the correct pressure. Those factors are important, because an even coat can save you time and money. You're less likely to need a second or third coat of paint.
I've only used this set for a couple of projects, but they are holding up great so far. The brush heads have kept their shape do far. I'm not see ing any unreasonable fraying. I also like the weight of the handle and how these brushes feel in my hand. ARTEZA did a nice job with this set. I would recommend them, for sure!

This is a huge set at a great value in my opinion! We have a lot of hobby artists in this house, so these brushes have been an awesome addition for our family. There is a large variety of brushes in the set; enough so my younger kids don't fight over the same brush. We've been using them a couple times a week for the last month or so and they're holding up nicely. I'd recommend them!!!

This house is full of hobby artists and my daughter has been asking to try a dotting set for a long time. We started rock painting last year; my kids love to hide their rocks on our walks or at the local parks. This dotting set was an excellent way to spice up our designs! I even borrowed one of the tools to do some Xmas holiday nail art and it worked out great!
The tools are nice and are easy to clean. It's a nice set.... and comes with more than everything you will need. We'd all recommend it!!!

This is a huge set of googly eyes for a great price! I love doing pinterest projects with my kids and we have a lot of hobby artists in this house of many ages, so this set has been awesome! We've used them nearly every week so far. For example, once for an elf on the shelf prank and another time for eyes on a sock puppets. They stayed put with both hot glue and elmer's. I'd recommend them!!!

Wow! This is a huge set at a great value! We have a lot of hobby artists of various ages in our house, so this set was awesome for us. The paint is nice thick and you get a good variety of colors. Plus, everything else you need to started bringing your ideas to life. There will be plenty of paint left over after you've painted the canvases, promise! I'd highly recommend this set!!!

It's fall of 2020 and I've been spending a lot of time at home due to Covid. I've become obsessed with DIY paint by numbers. This particular one is really nice! I'm having a lot of fun time painting this one.
I've found the paints and the brushes that came in this set are of nice quality. The brushes are holding up with very little fraying so far. And the paints are thick, so I don't have to repaint too often (that's a real time saver).
The only thing I didn't love about this set is the canvas came folded. There are creases that I will never get out. But this is my 9th paint by number set around this price point and every one came with a canvas that was folded.
So overall, I like this DIY set a lot. I think as long as you're realize you are not purchasing a hand-me-down heirloom piece of art and see it as a fun artistic project, you'll be more than pleased with this set. These DIY paint by numbers can take quite a while to finish... so for around $10 or $12 dollars you get a lot of entertainment "bang for your buck" in my opinion. I'd highly recommend this painting and look forward to purchasing from this company again.

My youngest is an artist at heart and asks to paint nearly every day. We found these paint pens really easy to use, granted you follow the instructions! The paint is thick and they're easy to grip. The paint washed off her hands fine. I'd recommend them.

My two oldest love making slime, but I'll admit I am terrible at it. I can make the basic slime recipe... but any of the specialty slime we've attempted (like cloud slime, galaxy slime, etc), never turn out for us like it shows in the pictures/videos. So we all think these easy-to-follow Elmer's kits are amazing!!!
In fact, my 6 & 9 year old didn't even need my help! It really was that kid friendly. The slime turned out perfect and they've continued to play with it after school just about every day now. Can't recommend these fun Elmer's kits enough!!!

I considered myself an artist first before I had kids and became a stay-at-home mom. Now most of the art I get to make revolves around the kids; and I have a hard time using my very expensive, artist quality supplies on temporary art projects.
So I was very excited to receive these brushes! I primarily paint with acrylic and watercolor, and these brushes work great for both. I was impressed with their quality right out if the box... considering how much these didn't cost. The brushes were tappered (cut) correctly and kept their shape once wet. The wood handles are smooth and comfortable to hold.
I compared these to one of Winsor & Newton's more affordable artist quality brushes. According to W&N, the brushes in this set are numbered wrong. For example, a brush labeled as a size 11 in this set is closer to a W&N size 6 or 8. I don't think that's a deal breaker for a hobby artist.
Also, you can see by the swatch test, these brushes (the black ones) pick up and lay down more product than the red W&N ones. This isn't considered a desirable trait in an artist's brush, but again I think it's just fine for the occasional artist. They still left a pretty consistent, non-streaky paint line!
This is a really good set in my opinion. There is a nice variety of sizes that should fit most people's needs. I would recommend these.

This is a beautiful set! I picked it up mainly for my girls art projects (slime, paper art, etc).... but I'll be stealing a few of the colors to use on my own nails!!!
I like that they came packaged in a resealable bag and with extra eye makeup sponges. A few of the sponges came stained thought, so I'll probably just use them on my nails. The sponges were still a welcome addition though, as they'll help keep the glitter mess way down.
Just know that these are pot jars of glitter with open tops. Meaning they do not have the plastic shaker lid with holes to keep you from spilling or using too much.
The last picture shows where I swatched the bright colored glitter with clear nail polish. This glitter did NOT dissolve or break down; and I aggressively attacked it with the nail polish brush for over a minute (the little gray spots next to the glitter are air bubbles).
Overall, I'm really impressed with this set. It comes with a ton of beautiful very sparkling glitter. It's going to take us a few years to use all this up! Can't recommend this glitter set enough!!!!
Soda can for size reference.

Take this review with a grain of salt, since this was our first diamond art project.
I picked this up mainly so my 6yo and I could have something extra fun to do during one-on-one time together. This seemed like the perfect project to hold her attention.
But once this was in hand, I could see it was a project she'd wasn't ready to do this on her own. I'm glad I precommited myself to spending several hours working on this with her.
Picking up the gems with the pen was a bit difficult for her; and to be honest, it always easy for me. I could only pick up the gems about half the time on the first shot. And my biggest complaint was these gems were virtually weightless; and so was the plastic tray to pour them onto. Being so lightweight, we knocked the gems all over the place. And lost a lot of diamonds in the process. Again, bring our first diamond kit, I don't know if this is normal. Either way, we still had a good time working on it together.

- In all fairness, I haven't embroidered in 25 years, so I didn't expect this project to go perfectly smoothly.... But I took to this again like a fish to water. The fifth picture was how far I got after about two hours.
- I would say this kit is not for an absolutely brand new beginner... But would be easy enough second or third cross stitch project.
-It lost a star because the instructions are not very clear. I had to pull up a couple of YouTube videos to for a better visual representation of how to pull off some of these stitching techniques required here.
-It is also no where near as big as what the seller has pictured in the photoshopped living room photos in this listing.
-As others have suggested, I would also recommend a threading tool and a very sharp pair of sewing scissors to help thread the needle and cut down on frustration. Without a threading needle, you'll spend more time fussing over the string than actually stitching. I suspect that to be true of any similar stitching kit, to be honest.
- Overall I still think this project is a good value. It's been a ton of fun so far!

I recently got into making macrame plant hangers for my apartment and this is the BEST cord I've found.  The color options are beautiful and the cord is easy to work with.  It has enough rigidity to hold up to intricate knots without binding or pinching while still having just the right elasticity to loop and fold.  Great weight, great material, looks beautiful as a finished product.

These are great for kids who really love coloring. Because my 12 yr old loves to color , that got my 5 yr old into who for a 5 yr old colors really well. They went through a box of these in 6mths and requested more just like them.

Finally....something to help me from burning my fingers!!!
Perfect fit & help up great!!!

Great value for the money I spent on this set. We've already used the set for a few projects & not one tube has run out of paint. And for the record, we have used all the colors! Great quality. A little goes a long way on these paints.

Will definitely buy more when needed.
This mold worked great. I had no issues getting the soap out of the mold and it cleaned up quickly and easily.

I bought these to use for making melt and pour soap and they work great. The designs were very clear on the finished soap and they were easy to remove from the mold. Washing them afterwards was quite easy as well. Highly recommend.
Great selection of multi sizes and prints on each. I have replaced awful buttons with these and used the decoratively on various pieces of clothing. They was and dry perfectly. Affordable and fun.
Solved my concerns about losing my charms on my necklace. Easy to use with Anglers mini ring pliers, did not stretch out or lose their shapes. Perfect.
Looks nice, but very small. I should have read the description.

I bought this having almost no sewing knowledge and within months I made a quilt. The directions are very clear and I'm happy with its performance. This is definitely something that novice sewers can use without feeling overwhelmed.
Very handy in my hobby.

These are not plastic. They are gelatin like all the others. Such a disappointment.
I am a relatively new crocheter, but I am so glad that I bought these. I find them easy to use and they slip smoothly through the yarn. I also like how I can tinker toy bits together.
Really cheap brushes, because they’re really cheap.
Great product.  Fair price.
I like the different sizes, fits great in different sized cups.
Used this product in my trade booth.  Very good display piece for the money.

Absolutely love this product.  Used it twice in the first two days of having it.  Highly recommend these mats as they have w grid.  I was blocking s shawl with right angle box edging.  The grid made it so easy to do this correctly.
These needles are long enough for my project.  The tips are pointy but not sharp.  A great value for the price.

It came out nice.  However, quality is not nearly as good as other brands.  Lots of too small and odd shaped dots.  There were enough good ones the complete the project but fishing through the deformed ones was frustrating.
Good stamps.

great product.......love that the rickrac comes on a finished wooden spool.  what a nice presentation, and these would be a great gift for a sewer.  I got lots of the colors for a quilt project, and I just love them.  I will keep the spools and wrap with ribbons and other trims that are just thrown in a box.
i also take this when i travel to quilt/sewing classes.  it is compact, pretty, and secure.  Cute gift item, too.

shared a bottle with my quilting friends at a retreat.........everyone was impressed.  it is truly unscented, and the nozzle gives out a fine spray.  does not send out big drops that soak the fabric.  I will be reordering.
one side has the magnet, and it is strong.  super cute, too.

Not only reduces sewing/serger machine noise, the padding keeps accessories from sliding around on the table.  I have scissors, extra feet, a tray of pins......all stay in place. these colored pencils are well made and have good color!

All these remotes are black in my house. Why they are black I will never understand! I have a devil of a time finding them in the dark. I had the idea of putting some glow-in-the-dark tape on them to make these easier to find. The tape is a big improvement. Just make sure before applying the tape that the surface chosen has been wiped down with rubbing alcohol & dried thoroughly before the tape is applied.
Love that they don't slide on my tile counter.

Enjoy knitting with these needles. Work slides off effortlessly. Would buy again.
