Takes the frustration out of needle threading - except, you must use Clover brand needles.
Great item for English paper piecing. Arrived quickly.
So nice to have needles on hand whenever I need them. No longer sew with a poor needle, which makes all the difference to my machine and the finished product.
great price, perfect for filler
Just what I needed.
Schmitz can’t be beat!
Work well for me. I'm using them for small projects where gauge is not critical. I usually use wood needles. My daughter bought some size 2 and found gauge problems: stitches bigger than not.
Attractive and somewhat ergonomic. However, the printed mm is inaccurate and the metal hook is too long to be comfortable.
These are very smooth. Great sizes.
Just what I wanted.
So great that I ordered an extra one in the size I use most!  The set sits beside my favorite chair.
We need a lot of white gouache so I bought this big tube. It’s not opaque. Not pigmented enough. Seems watery and thin.
Two big and lush pieces of sea sponges. The seller followed up with detailed instructions for taking care of sponges, helpful as I am using them for watercolor for the first time.

I furthered sharpened all the pencils into long points. Only one or two broke at the top. Simply testing to draw, they feel like good quality soft core wax based pencils. Bright colors. I bought another set just to keep them. I am an student and don’t need to use the expensive pencils for every drawing.
Great for beginners to get started with watercolor.
Nice selection. Good price.

What a miserable disappointment this product is - it started to leak air the first time I tried to use it!!
So it was sent straight back to Amazon for credit.

Horrible! None of the 3 brushes will stop shedding. The first thing I do when I get new brushes is inspect the bristles and gently pull to remove loose bristles (there are always a few, even with the best brushes) however these will not stop shedding. I don't think I will even attempt to use them for any projects.
I expected it to contain the thread and bobbins
Love the templates and the variety of uses.
Love this!  Super lite and portable.  So nice to not have a cord
They're easy-to-use and I love the organizer
Don't seem to hold tight, gradually slip down and stretch. Only good for 1x use.
I use these for sewing as a quick alternative to pins. Also, have them stashed in my desk for sealing envelopes and much more. They last a long time.
These shears are excellent for all sewing needs.  Very comfortable handles, lightweight design and sharp blades for a very affordable price.  Quality is excellent.

This is the PERFECT weight batting for all of my quilts.  It lays nice and flat, and is extremely easy to work with and position.  I feel it is the perfect thickness for all my quilting needs.  Excellent product!
I honestly don't see that this actually "smooths" a mat in any way.  However, it is nice for removing stray fibers.
This presser foot is a wonderful tool to assist in sewing around curves.  However, it is a bit tricky to use at first.  However, I am confident I will master it with consistent use.

I bought this mat because of its bright color and LARGE numbers.  However, beware that the measuring marks are on the INSIDE of the border lines and therefore useless when lining up fabric to be cut!  Other mats that I own have the measurement markings on the OUTSIDE of the border lines, which makes much more sense!  GREAT mat otherwise; colors on both sides have LARGE easy to read numbers.  I will be returning for a mat with measurement markings OUTSIDE of borders.
These are great blades for my 45mm Olfa rotary cutter.  I change my blades with each new project so this 5 pack is very handy!

Heavy fabric which I like. It is cotton/polyester which makes bow- making a bit more challenging. However, I d rather put a bit more effort into that for the finished result of a beautiful high quality looking bow!
Great buy.
Cards were beautiful but the price stinks !!  I bought these back in January, 2017 for $9.91.  This prime listing is marked up $10 MORE!  Love the product...HATE THE PRICE INCREASE.
This sketch book is so cheap made. I open it and it already fell apart. Glue is the only thing that holds it together but cheap glue that falls part so fast. Not worth it!!!
These are very very cute!
It’s very cute but very very thin and flat. Not nearly as fluffy as shown in the picture. The quality is okay but I’ve used it maybe once ever and I’ve had it a few years.
Works great, holds a surprising amount of paper!

Just the perfect size to have on my coffee table with my little clover Iron. When I'm making ribbon trim for hats or just need a little touch up on a piece of trim, I cannot be bothered to get my whole ironing board and iron on. When I first got my clover iron, I realized it was so hot it would burn almost anything it rested on. Now I have a little cutting board and a little ironing board right next to each other and I can keep the iron on while I work. I would give it five stars if the cutting board had grid lines on it.
It worked perfect for my wedding center piece!

My daughter actually bought this for a school project. The tape in itself she said is very good, and the only reason she gave it a 4 instead of a 5star rating is because, the tape was transparent.  She said it really good tape, and sticks really good (very sticky), but it was very see through. She said its very expensive, not cheap, but worth it for the quality, however, if you want opaque tape, this is not the one you want.
Does not work well
Came quick and weeding was a breeze
Great for crafts
ChalkOla is my NEW FAVORITE store for all these chalk :)  I LOVE these markers and the extremely nice email from Anuj with tips & tricks made it even better!

This machine looks like it is going to work well.  I wish it had come with some clay to work with.  I think that is a big mistake on the part of the seller - not to provide at least a starting quantity of clay to get started.  I am looking forward to using this - looks really impressive.

This is a great set of 35 snowflake ornaments that can be left natural or painted.  They can also be used as ornaments or tie to gift wrapped packages.  They are well made and really beautiful.  Even better than expected.

Anybody can dye an egg, but these pens let you personalize them!  Nice, bright colors and so many - we had the whole group around the table choosing colors and producing works of art!  Much more fun than just dying!  These pens will be used for so many things - great choice!

These are great for candlemaking - especially small, gift candles.  We’re experimenting with lavender-scented candles, so these are perfect for our use.  Good to find this source - when we are happy with a prototype, we’ll be sending for more!

Great supply of good quality wooden beads - for so many purposes.  Great when the grandkids are here for making jewelry - great for making garlands for the Christmas tree in our farmhouse!  Great for making decorations - we’re just having all kinds of fun with them - and we may have to order more!

We’re cultivating a lot of new hobbies, so this was essential for the person who likes to sketch -  and perhaps progress to watercolors or even oils.  The paper is very thick and good quality for the beginning artist.  Great gift for a grandchild - with charcoal, colored pencils or watercolors.  Good choice!

I was looking for a bag that would be a single place for all my farmer’s market supplies and its perfect. It is a little smaller than I thought it would be, but thats actually good. Didn’t want something so big and heavy that it would be difficult to carry. Love the bonus tote which I wasn’t expecting. Great value!

Let’s bring embroidery back!  This is a great little kit for getting someone started on a new hobby.  Cross-stitch is an easy way to start, and it makes a pleasing and satisfying accomplishment.  This is suitable for younger children through seniors.  Nice starter kit.

Sturdy cotton cord for tying around our bundles of lavender.  It is not always easy to find the right purple or lavender and I really like this color.  I will definitely need more so now I know where to get it.
Love this cotton cord to tie around flower bundles for the farmer’s market. Simple and sweet- just what I was looking for.

We need to put our names on a sign down by the mailbox, so we’ve got the board now, and the paint, and just have to select our stencils for our name.  Great idea to make your own sign.  You can save so much money, and with stencils, the job is so easy.  Nice kit - making our sign this weekend!

This is a great set of charcoals for just about any artist that sketches in charcoal - everything one needs in a small roll - easy to carry for location sketching.  Great array of charcoal from hard to very soft, erasers and some empty slots to add the artists personal favorites.  Case is not beautiful but does carry a lot of items.

We have flowers blooming all year at the farm - so we’re always arranging flowers for our dining room, living room, and along the kitchen window.  This can be done so much more professionally with the floral foam, which we cut to the shape we need.  The foam also holds water so that flowers stay moist and nourished longer.  Very happy to have this supply of floral foam.

No matter how many paintbrushes we buy, it seems like some are always wearing pout from too much cleaning, so this set was really welcome.  All sizes for all purposes, and we’re taking good care of them sand give them careful cleaning.  This is a great set of different sizes - it’s such a pleasure to use good brushes.

I love these watercolor markers.  I was using colored pencils, but the markers give me such great effects.  I got a pad of watercolor paper, so now I’m ready to try my wings on something original.  Watercolors just seemed too difficult to manage before - but, with some experimentation, I’m finding that you can get great results with these markers.  Good choice,
Not as large as I thought it was going. I will  allow my grandkids to use it.  We were going to use it for arts and crafts.
All the treasure gold paints are gorgeous, leave a beautiful elegant luster to my stroke work on ornaments.
Love to work with Yupo
Very nice. Can't figure out how to use the small nib and see no instructions to access it.

I have used these for several years for applying photos to the surface and painting around the edge.  Glass requires handling with care, but we have had glass ornaments my whole life.  I like the large discs, but these are just right to apply the photos and the acrylic are ok but have a rounder surface to work with, but my clients who need them like them just as well.

I really like this watercolor kit. It is super cute and very compact. You get a nice range of colors in this kit. One tiny complaint. I wish they would have organized the colors more logically to be honest, they are just thrown in there kind of random and mine don't match what the picture shows either. The colors are also kind of small but they will last quite a bit.

In the lid are some smaller pans where you can mix your custom colors so that is a good idea from the manufacturer. It also comes with 2 unique little brushes. One is a finer one and one is a wider one. They open up and in the back goes the water. So instead of having a cup of water the brush actually stores it. Kind of neat but does take some to get used to to be honest.

The colors are very nice and work well. You can grab this quickly with you on the go and paint wherever you are really. I really like this and this also would make for a great gift. It comes in a nice little box for that. By no means is this the best quality water color paint, but you are also not paying a ton of money for this so I think this is pretty appropriate and very nice in my eyes.

This is a massive pack of 60 dual markers for the artist in your family. On one side you have calligraphy style markers that are just so much fun to draw with. One the other side you have the matching color but a fine point pen. These are perfect to draw and design with for all your artists. The colors cover the entire color spectrum and then some which is great, there really isn't a color missing. Perfect as gifts too. They come in this cute round box that will keep them all together.

This is a fun 24 pack of dual markers for the artist in your family. On one side you have calligraphy style markers that are just so much fun to draw with. One the other side you have the matching color but a fine point pen. These are perfect to draw and design with for all your artists. The colors cover the entire color spectrum which is great, there really isn't a color missing. Perfect as gifts too.
Love iris products. Look for them in local stores when I can and was thrilled to find these boxes that I needed for several different projects.

I love these paints! For the price you can not go wrong. They remind me a lot of the Paul Rubens watercolor sets. I love those as well. You just can't beat the price of these though!
There was only two things I didn't. 1: The plastic tray, some colors were not sticking in the tray they were out when I had opened it. 2: The tray itself was not glued down like it usually is.
It did not affect the paints at all. I just transferred them into pans and magnetized them into the tin. I highly doubt that it will be a problem for everyone. Sometimes things get missed and I understand that. I still love the paints and I love the customer service from the sellers!

I love the multiple pockets in the pencil case. I am very pleased with this. The only reason I did not give 5 stars is that once you put things inside the side pockets, especially on the pencil slot side, it doesn't want to zip up properly. I do wish the pencil case was much bigger also. Other than that I do love it and recommend this product. 😁

I just love this cord! it's a braided cord so there are no loose threads when knotting and a knot can be undone without losing the shape of the cord.  It can be combed out - use a metal comb that's meant for animals - and the threads are very soft when combed out (might need a stiffener depending on what you're doing with the combed out threads).  Great product ... took a while to arrive but it's well worth the wait!!

So handy, convenient, easy to fold up and carry in my purse, have used on many occasions, great little inexpensive  item to have on hand! **** Great for stocking stuffers or Easter Baskets**** or little just because gifts for a coworkers birthday card…. Just a thought 😉
This wasn’t exactly what I expected but it has came in handy.
Not as sharp as I would like for Fabric, but will still cut patterns quite nicely.
I love these little buttons for ear savers. They are cute but are not coated so I’m really not sure about durability with repeated washing.
Love this glue!
Not for large hands.. if your a Costco member Nov 2022 they had the larger one with sticks for 12.97
Translucent to clear. Returned.
Love this stuff got it on a good deal and will continue to buy it

Awesome case works well for pencils however does not work for gel pens if you have over a hundred maybe less..... however for the pictures this case is not designed to take gel pens I bought it on a hunch that it would however I will be using it for my pencils ......it is a great case I love it........ I purchase this case this is a real review and I hope it helps you all

Update: after using this paper to make some holiday ornaments I found a use for it and the results are very pretty. It does accept a glue stick pretty well. So I couldn’t make I intended it for because it is too thick but for single folding and gluing paper ornaments it’s charming. But it does have quite a few limitations.

This is too thick to fold sharply like real origami paper. It will not accept glue so it’s not great for other uses either. Also one sided. Disappointed.

I love everything about this paper. I’ve been using Arches blocks so I’m used to high quality but this did not disappoint. I love the 8 x 8 size and the decked edge. Daniel Smith watercolors lay down on it really well. Also ink pens and paint markers. It’s just beautiful!

I use bamboo needles a lot so I know what to expect from the material. Not normally this short though! I'm pleasantly surprised at how easy they are to work with, and how well made they are. The only downside for me is that my tension, which is already loose, is slacker with these short needles. Something about a looser grip, maybe, using fewer fingers than on a longer needle, but I had already sized down so I should be okay. I needed this length because the usual circular needles made a very small hat physically impossible to knit in the round.
I threaded ornament hangers through the back of these and put them on the tree, which has a natural, no plastic theme this year. They look great!

Nice high density, just the right thickness for my portable massage table. Knocked off a star for the chemical smell. I've left it outside for a while so it can off-gas, rather that enter my lungs. That's memory foam a lot of the time, but these days it doesn't have to be. The price was right though. All in all, it's exactly the product I was looking for.

I'm pleased with both the wire and the tape because it's exactly what I needed for my project. There is not very much tape on the roll, so I will have to order a larger roll. Knocked off a star for that.

Giftie for my son. He loves them. I want some for myself. Such a convenient size. The back is printed like a postcard, so they're mail ready, if you have a lucky person to send a painting to. Nice quality, heavy watercolor paper. No complaints whatsoever.
Please don't waste your time and money. Not worth more than $1. Metal ends are not squared with the tape.
Really love this mold! Have made some soaps and they look so elegant with the round edges.
